programme.desc: Police believed that a husband murdered his wife after they learn that he had taken out a life insurance policy on her shortly before she died. When an investigator recreates the fall, the results are surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Core Evidence
programme.desc: When a 16-month-old baby dies, tests discover e. coli in her system. Eventually the bacteria are traced back to a fruit juice manufacturer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sealed With a Kiss
programme.desc: For more than a year, angry, hateful letters were sent to a first grade school teacher in a small town in Pennsylvania. When scientists analyzed the letters, they found evidence that the sender knew a lot about the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Postal Mortem
programme.desc: On October 15, 1985, two bombs rocked Salt Lake City and resulted in two deaths. A third explosion occurred the next day, but this time the victim survived. Police believed that the survivor is more than an innocent by-stander.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A young doctor in a rural community is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting two of his female patients. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the women continue to insist that he sedated and raped them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pure Evil
programme.desc: In 1993, two Texas teenagers, a 14-year-old boy and his 13-year-old stepsister, were brutally murdered. It took forensic evidence and a behavioral profile to identify their killer as Jason Massey, who had a history of torturing animals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Whodunit
programme.desc: An evening out to a murder mystery theatre turns into a real life whodunit.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: A fire leads investigators to re-examine an unusual death.

programme.desc: Josh Gates travels to the Holy Land to dig in with an archaeologist who has recently discovered new Dead Sea Scrolls. Josh also sees cutting-edge technology restore scroll fragments in a way that could change how we read the Bible.

programme.desc: Josh Gates investigates a unique Dead Sea Scroll etched with riddles that could lead to an ancient treasure. Following new leads, Josh treks into the punishing Jordanian desert in search of the potential fortune.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Ancestors and Air Travel
programme.desc: Josh Gates travels all around the world digging up information on two mysteries: the origins of humanity and the elusive Northwest Flight 2501.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: India's Atlantis
programme.desc: Josh Gates travels to India in search of Dwarka, a mythical kingdom swallowed by the ocean. To find evidence that the golden city is real, Josh dives into the Arabian Sea and visits a dig site that could rewrite history.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Ancestors and Air Travel
programme.desc: Josh Gates travels all around the world digging up information on two mysteries: the origins of humanity and the elusive Northwest Flight 2501.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Stalked on the Savannah

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lady and the Tramp

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: No Sugar, Tons of Spice
programme.desc: Two teams duke it out against the catastrophic concoctions from Chef Willie.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Jonas Brothers

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Find out which jokers were in on the surprise Gary Busey appearance, where the phrase 'tit for tat' came from, and how Murr's big mouth backfired on him, leading to this Statue of Liberty punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: Find out which joker has pet parakeets, why the crew had to work in a truck down the block while filming at a bagel shop and who got to sound the start horn for Murr's race across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: Find out which joker always brings a bag of dental hygiene products to set, why Q changed into cargo pants in a store window and where the art department found the turquoise ring.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a bike but won't ride it in the city, how Murr gets around backstage while on tour and what Murr's building staff refused to do during his punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Field of Screams
programme.desc: How the creepy voice changer was made for Devil Voices. The penguin tips Murr learned as a zookeeper.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hump Day
programme.desc: Learn how the crew attracted more customers to eat at GRK, what piece of iconic 'Jokers' history was made in this same focus group space and who caused several delays in the filming of Q's zoo punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: Find out whose familiar face showed up in the waiting room, how many dogs Sal had to babysit, and which Joker came up with the punishment that left Joe feeling numb.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover who considered taking a quick thumbs down. Plus, find out what type of vacation Murr prefers, and how many attempts it took to film the punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Shame of Water
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Murr and Sal find scandalous diary entries written by their 'daughters', and then break up with significant others in front of strangers. The loser will find himself in hot water and on shaky ground while waiting tables.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Scaredy Cat
programme.desc: Find out which Joker almost walked out of a challenge, and what scene inspired the name of a fan's baby. Plus, learn which Joker is allergic to cats.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bad Carma
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q showcase questionable products to participants, and then rescue strangers who don't need to be rescued. Later, the big loser must hit and run his mouth to get himself out of trouble.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fast Feud

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr bus their way through Katz’s Deli, then express some unpopular opinions at the park. Plus, tonight’s big loser must talk his way through some real highs and lows, in a punishment that truly sucks.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins America
programme.desc: Adam lets his freedom flag fly by examining why America doesn’t have higher rates of social mobility. He then uncovers the flaws within the constitution and examines the country’s progression and regression.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Night Out
programme.desc: Adam and Emily prepare for a big night out by revealing the marketing ploy that led to women shaving and the fashion agendas that created pockets. Then, the two friends pour back the truth on alcohol consumption.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Doing Good
programme.desc: Adam takes down the do-gooders and reveals how 'Teach for America' is harmful to both students and teachers. He then uncovers the ineffectiveness of recycling and calls out the billionaires who create charities for tax breaks.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Murder
programme.desc: Adam shines a headlight on why drivers are rarely prosecuted for car accidents that result in death. He breaks down border patrol's problematic search policies and examines the messed-up history of corpses and medical studies.

programme.title: Almost Genius: Digging Deep
programme.desc: From a butt-naked rock climber, to a kid inventing new curse words, and the never ending twerk, we're digging deep to find the greatest no-getters out there.

programme.title: Almost Genius: Hardly Working

programme.title: Almost Genius: Falling Short

programme.title: Almost Genius: Flying Low

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Top Priority of NASA

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: A Problem With Chocolate Turtles and Seeds
programme.desc: Find out what trick required the camera operator to hide inside a box for the entire day and how the show got its name.

programme.desc: Find out which trick went viral on a hip-hop blog, what word is hard for Michael to pronounce and what degree Michael earned in college.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: It's a Makeshifte
programme.desc: Find out why Michael had to get scorpion training, what animal the crew chased around a store and where Michael's favourite vacation spots are.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Partiers 14

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Epic Fails

programme.title: Movie: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: A pair of bumbling cops are sent back to high school where they attempt to blend in to take down a drug ring.

programme.title: Movie: That Awkward Moment
programme.desc: Three single guys have sworn to remain bachelors in support of their heartbroken friend. As their current conquests become more than flings, the trio is tasked with keeping their relationships under wraps, and must examine just where things are headed.

programme.desc: Three single guys have sworn to remain bachelors in support of their heartbroken friend. As their current conquests become more than flings, the trio is tasked with keeping their relationships under wraps, and must examine just where things are headed.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Born and Raised
programme.desc: Leslie falls prey to some 'gotcha' journalism while promoting her new book. Ann is determined to bond with Ron and April.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Pawnee Rangers
programme.desc: In an effort to protest the inequality of Ron's boys-only trip, Leslie takes the girls on a trip of their own.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Meet N' Greet
programme.desc: Andy and April decide to throw a Halloween party at their house, which upsets Ben.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: End of the World
programme.desc: A local Pawnee group predicts that the end of the world is coming, causing Leslie and the others to contemplate their lives.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: The Treaty
programme.desc: Leslie enlists the help of her friends to host a model U.N. at Pawnee Central High School. Chris asks Ann for advice about love when his date cancels on him.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Smallest Park
programme.desc: Leslie uses her new tourist attraction as a way to spend more time with Ben. Ron and April encourage Andy to go to college.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: The Trial of Leslie Knope
programme.desc: When things come to a head for Leslie, she must defend her actions.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Citizen Knope
programme.desc: Leslie forms a citizen action group to achieve changes outside of the Parks Department. Meanwhile, everyone in the office brainstorms to get ideas for Leslie's Christmas gift.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: The Comeback Kid
programme.desc: Leslie enlists everyone's help in staging an attention-getting event. Ben explores a new hobby.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Campaign Ad
programme.desc: Faced with a tough new opponent, Leslie and Ben disagree on the content of her first campaign ad. Ron is very uncomfortable when Chris tries to befriend him, while Andy and April make a trip to the doctor.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Bowling for Votes
programme.desc: Leslie and Ben decide to hold a casual bowling party after hearing from a focus group.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Operation Ann
programme.desc: On Valentine's Day, Leslie decides she needs to find Ann a new man. Ben must enlist Ron's help when he is stumped by Leslie's elaborate Valentine's Day scavenger hunt.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Dave Returns
programme.desc: While trying to get an endorsement from the chief of police, Leslie and Ben run into Leslie's old flame, Dave.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Sweet Sixteen
programme.desc: Leslie realizes the department has forgotten Jerry's birthday and decides to throw him a party.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Campaign Shake-Up
programme.desc: Leslie and Ben are caught off guard when her opponent, Bobby Newport, hires a powerful campaign manager from Washington.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Lucky
programme.desc: Leslie and Ben are thrilled when an Indianapolis talk show wants to interview Leslie.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Live Ammo
programme.desc: Leslie finds out the parks departments budget is about to be cut and tries to convince the councilman to make the cuts elsewhere which causes unexpected problems for her campaign.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: The Debate
programme.desc: Leslie goes toe to toe with Bobby Newport in their big televised debate. Ann, Tom and Chris work in the media spin room, while Ron goes the extra mile to save a party for Leslie's donors.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Bus Tour
programme.desc: When Leslie goes on a bus tour for the final day of her campaign, she is caught off guard when an important person in Pawnee passes away. Meanwhile, Andy susses out a security threat and Chris finds an unlikely cure for his depression.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Win, Lose or Draw
programme.desc: Bobby Newport and Leslie are separated by a razor thin margin on Election Day. While everyone waits with Leslie for the race to be called, they ponder their futures and potential opportunities.

programme.title: Movie: 17 Again
programme.desc: A man, who feels a great deal of regret about his life choices, wishes he could go back in time to change a few things. One morning, he wakes up to find he's been given a second chance to be 17 again.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Revisited: An Owner Who Tries to Do It All
programme.desc: Robert Irvine revisits Dodge City Steakhouse in Harrisburg, Penn., to see if the owner is delegating responsibilities or trying to do everything on his own like he did when Robert came to his aid in 2011.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Cajun Seafood Crisis
programme.desc: The Balcony in Larose, La., is one of the oldest Cajun seafood restaurants in the bayou. The owner has worked there for 28 years, but her friendly relationship with the employees has cost her their respect.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Globe Tasting
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's getting an authentic taste of all ends of the earth. In Bakersfield, Calif., the firehouse-turned-restaurant firing up Latin-fusion favorites like basque lamb tacos and popcorn pork with a side of zing.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Indulgent Dishes
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's indulging himself in righteous, rich recipes. In Charlotte, North Carolina, a crazy seafood spot is reelin' in off-the-hook gumbo and a spicy mahi specialty. Across town, a mother-daughter team is servin' up savoury lamb ragout.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Superstar Tournament Part 1
programme.desc: Eight of America's best celebrity chefs are competing against each other in a no-holds-barred $40,000 tournament. Our Superstars confront every shopper's mortal enemy, the express lane. But since they're the best, Guy gives them an extreme limitation.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Superstar Tournament Part 2
programme.desc: In part two, the theme is budget battle royale. The seven remaining celebrity chefs are each given $36.01 to buy their groceries, but they must choose which round to use it in. In the end, one chef goes home and six move a step closer.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Superstar Tournament Part 3
programme.desc: In the third leg of the Guy's Superstars Tournament, the remaining six chefs are all given the same grocery list, but must compete in three one-on-one battles to see who makes the best breakfast, lunch or dinner.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Superstar Tournament Part 4
programme.desc: It's the semifinals of the Guy's Grocery Games: Superstars Tournament and Guy has devised two shocking shopping cart games for the five remaining celebrity chefs. First, they must search the store to discover where Guy has hidden their personal cart.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Superstar Tournament Finale
programme.desc: It's the finale of the Triple G Superstars Tournament and the final four celebrity chefs are all vying to become the champion. But first they must face Guy's most diabolical challenge yet: The Double Wheel o' Games.

programme.desc: Guy and his chef friends celebrate the Golden State with a Cali-inspired brunch spread. Eric Greenspan makes lemon ricotta pancakes, Aaron May prepares crab benedict and avocado salad and Carl Ruiz makes tallegio and asparagus paninis.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Hot In Cleveland Reunion

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Cleaning Out The Fridge

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Father and Daughter
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is busy working on a mom-made lunch for her father-daughter duo on the farm.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Oh, Baby

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Osage Cowboy's Lunch

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Hawaii Farm'O

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: When Life Gives You Lemons... Rejoice!

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Birthday Dinner

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Baby Shower Brunch
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis hosts an elegant baby shower and brunch for her young Aunt Carolyna, who is like a little sister to Giada.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Retro Remakes
programme.desc: The Kitchen gives retro recipes some modern upgrades, starting with Geoffrey Zakarian's new-style steak Diane. The hosts put old-school kitchen rules to the test and share their own tips and then Sunny Anderson makes her famous pigs-in-a-blanket.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Chicago's Finest
programme.desc: Guy takes a tour of the Windy City, exploring the flavours of Chicago. He tastes everything from twists on burgers to old-school diner classics.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Bait and Switch
programme.desc: McKee and Pushee confront two hunters lying about illegally baiting deer, Officer Arsenault deals with a tight-lipped teenage fisherman who refuses to provide any information and Lt. Boudreau stumbles upon a couple in a compromising position.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Cold Case
programme.desc: Officers Bronson and Lucas help state police investigate a 19-year-old missing person case. A landowner requests help with a group of squatters on an island in the Connecticut River. And, Officer Towne comes to the aid of an injured hawk.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Hit and Run
programme.desc: Lieutenant Boudreau and trainee Crouse investigate a man who shot someone while hunting illegally. Sergeant Lucas responds to a porcupine wreaking havoc. Later, when a seriously ill hiker is trapped on Mount Garfield, Officer Holmes races to the scene.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Rules of the Game
programme.desc: Officer Canfield responds to a call about an orphaned bear cub. Sgt. Lucas pays an unexpected visit to a hunter suspected of illegal baiting. And Officer Cyrs investigates a large buck shot by a young, nervous hunter during muzzleloader season.

programme.title: North Woods Law: No Trespassing
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett investigate a possible illegal turkey kill site, while Officer Bronson responds to a call about a snake in a bed. Officer Demler confronts a suspect about shooting a turkey on private property.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Circle of Life
programme.desc: Officer Crouse responds to a call about a nuisance raccoon, while Officer Towne searches for a deer attacked by coyotes. Officer Hannett monitors a suspicious fisherman and Officer St. Pierre responds to a call about an impaired driver.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Don't Feed the Bears
programme.desc: Officer Joe Canfield investigates a home with multiple bear feeding complaints and finds more than he bargained for. Officer Egan investigates an abandoned car and missing persons case. And Officers respond to a drowning in the Connecticut River.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Last Days of Winter
programme.desc: The dive team assists at an event in Hampton Beach, while Officer Courtney patrols the area's clam flats. Officers Hannett and Holmes patrol snowmobile activity across the state. And Officer Demler helps a bobcat that's been injured by a porcupine.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Searching for Soul
programme.desc: Danny is commissioned by Barry White's estate to find and restore the legendary singer's Stutz IV Porte. Meanwhile, an old pullover visits the shop with a custom job that could teach The Count a lesson.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Boiling Point
programme.desc: Danny and Kevin find themselves in hot water when a motorcycle pullover goes south. Later, a woman brings in her recovered IROC-Z and leaves with a genius thief-busting solution.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Really Sweet 16
programme.desc: Danny conspires with a proud dad to give the ultimate surprise 16th birthday gift, and the shop frustrates a customer with a design error on a scaled-down commemorative Model T Firetruck.

programme.title: Counting Cars: You Talkin' to Me?
programme.desc: A Hollywood icon confronts Horny Mike and Roli in the shop parking lot. Danny tries to diffuse the situation before it gets explosive.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Drive: The Horn Ultimatum
programme.desc: Danny discovers the rarest Cadillac collection he's ever seen. Later, Horny Mike has 30 days to move his big ugly bus from the shop's parking lot before Danny has it sent to the dump.

programme.title: Counting Cars: '70s Scoot
programme.desc: Danny takes on a psychedelic chopper project that is so '70s cool, he's worried he might not be able to give it to the customer when it's done. Later, he hits the streets to check out a pair of classic Mini Coopers and a rare Split Bumper Camaro.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Sweet Lambo of Mine

programme.title: Counting Cars: Sailor's Soul
programme.desc: Representatives from Sailor Jerry enlist the shop's help to build a bike to commemorate the late artist's iconic style and to auction off at an upcoming charity fundraiser.

programme.title: Counting Cars: The Amazing Z
programme.desc: It seems every time Danny finds a project for the shop, he winds up keeping it. Now Ryan and Kevin are determined to find a car Danny will actually fix up, and flip.

programme.title: Counting Cars: The Fast and the Ridiculous Part One
programme.desc: Ryan, Mike and Shannon convince Danny to sponsor them in a 24-hour endurance race called The LeMons. This race pits cheap hunks of junk against each other deep in the Arizona desert. Meanwhile, Danny has the guys work on a special one of a kind project.

programme.title: Counting Cars: The Fast and the Ridiculous Part Two
programme.desc: The guys finally find a not so perfect car for the Arizona Lemons race; a beat up old racer, once owned by Shannon. With a little begging and very little cash they buy it back. Next they resurrect the Junker as the 'Counts Bloody Mess.'

programme.title: Counting Cars: Counts of Hazzard
programme.desc: Guitarist DJ Ashba stops by the shop to have Danny work on his 100 year old Model-T rat rod. Then, the crew are commissioned to build a 21st century version of the iconic General Lee Dodge Charger from the 'Dukes of Hazzard' TV show.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: Winter

programme.desc: The polar regions experience the planet's most extreme seasons and are home to some of its most surprising animal behaviours. Polar bears search and fight for mates, penguins surf and orcas hunt collaboratively.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: Spring
programme.desc: Spring arrives in the poles and the sun appears after many months of darkness, as do the adelie penguins. In the Antarctic, the sun seems welcoming but its return triggers fierce katabatic winds.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Africa
programme.desc: Even in Africa, home of the greatest wildlife gatherings on Earth, wildlife faces many challenges.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: Summer
programme.desc: The summertime is a time when the harshest environments on Earth temporarily become favourable for most. While the sun never sets, life speeds up for polar wildlife in a race to raise their young.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: Autumn
programme.desc: For the animals of the Polar Regions, time is running out in the autumn. The Arctic Ocean freezes over and the sea ice advances around Antarctica.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: Winter
programme.desc: There is no greater challenge for life than winter in the Polar Regions. As temperatures plummet to 70 degrees below zero Fahrenheit, witness the greatest test of survival on the planet.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: Revealing the riches and wonders of the Polar Regions that keep people coming for years. Its survival relies on a combination of ancient wisdom and cutting edge science.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: Spring
programme.desc: Spring arrives in the poles and the sun appears after many months of darkness, as do the adelie penguins. In the Antarctic, the sun seems welcoming but its return triggers fierce katabatic winds.

programme.title: Kingdom of the Oceans: Giants of the Deep
programme.desc: Discover the lives of some of the great predators that haunt the vast oceanic desert including blue whales and hordes of tuna.

programme.title: Kingdom of the Oceans: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: Examine the paradox of whales, penguins, iguanas and dolphins that inherited a burdensome legacy from their land-dwelling ancestors: they must breathe in open air.

programme.title: Kingdom of the Oceans: Predator's Paradise
programme.desc: Explore the living, breathing, colourful mountains of coral that shelter an extraordinarily diverse group of species of every colour, shape and behaviour.

programme.title: Kingdom of the Oceans: Sand Wars
programme.desc: Discover the multitudes of bizarre creatures that make the sandy plains of the seabed their home.

programme.title: Dr. T, Lone Star Vet: Big Bird, Big Problem
programme.desc: Dr. T sees a big bird with a big problem and a hedgehog with mysterious lumps.

programme.title: Dr. T, Lone Star Vet: Fishin' Impossible
programme.desc: Dr. T gets friendly with a fish; cheers up a chinchilla; and biopsies an adorable bunny.

programme.title: Dr. T, Lone Star Vet: Bunny 911
programme.desc: Dr. T sees an itchy bird, a dragon with rich taste and a pair of baby sugar gliders.

programme.title: Vet Exotic: Mother of Dragons
programme.desc: Dr. T aids a fugitive turtle, a peg-legged bird and a diva Guinea pig.

programme.title: Dr. T, Lone Star Vet: The Terrible Turkey Trot
programme.desc: Dr. T has her hands full with a prickly hedgehog in need of a tiny tooth extraction.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of Egypt's Mega Temple
programme.desc: The Egyptian mega-temple at Karnak was once the political powerbase of the ancient pharaohs and the home to strange religious rituals. New discoveries of skeletons tell a story of jealousy, betrayal, and the rise of a new religion that changed Egypt.

programme.title: Unearthed: Egypt's Lost Skyscrapers
programme.desc: A ground-breaking experiment reveals how ancient Egyptians built the giant obelisks of Thebes, and new discoveries at this holy site could explain why these mysterious marvels triggered the downfall of the pharaohs and the end of Egypt's golden age.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ramses' Buried Treasures
programme.desc: The treasures of Ramses II are found at Abu Simbel, a giant temple carved into a desert cliff over 3,000 years ago, and new discoveries at this marvel reveal the secrets of ancient Egypt's greatest pharaoh.

programme.title: Unearthed: Pompeii's Evil Twin
programme.desc: The lost city of Baiae was the Las Vegas of the ancient world, until a mysterious calamity caused it to sink into the sea. New discoveries reveal the secrets of this sin city that, like Pompeii, some experts believe was destroyed by a supervolcano.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hitler's Battleship of Doom
programme.desc: When satellites detect a strange underwater structure in the Arctic Circle, experts suspect it could be part of Hitler's prized World War II battleship. Using cutting-edge tech they investigate the secret history of this nightmare vessel.

programme.title: What on Earth?: CIA Killer Monks
programme.desc: Something strange in the Himalayas could be evidence of a top-secret CIA program to turn monks into killer agents, and cutting-edge science helps experts investigate the truth behind this mysterious anomaly.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Temple of Blood
programme.desc: An ancient man-made volcano might reveal buried treasure and bloody human sacrifice. When NASA discovers a strange pattern in the Arctic ice, experts investigate if it has alien origins. A mystery in the Sahara might have a sinister explanation.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Secrets of the Sahara
programme.desc: In 1965, a beautiful 25 mile structure called the Eye of the Sahara was found from space. Its formation is still unknown. Then, a terrifying new weather weapon could be discovered from clouds emanating from an island in the Indian Ocean.

programme.title: What on Earth?: CIA Killer Monks
programme.desc: Something strange in the Himalayas could be evidence of a top-secret CIA program to turn monks into killer agents, and cutting-edge science helps experts investigate the truth behind this mysterious anomaly.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Imhotep's Lost Labyrinth
programme.desc: After satellites spot an anomaly at Egypt's oldest pyramid, experts uncover a long-lost labyrinth. It could lead them to the darkest secrets of Imhotep, the mysterious high priest who built this strange complex.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: These Are the Streets
programme.desc: Stolen jeep followed; individuals are captured and a gun is recovered.

programme.title: American Monster: Falling Down
programme.desc: Alene and George Jenkins are the perfect couple living a perfect life. When their desire for children leads them to adopt a son and a daughter it seems their family is complete. But instead it triggers a dark spiral ending in an unspeakably awful crime.

programme.title: American Monster: Backyard Daddy
programme.desc: In Ogden, Utah, Stephen and Becky Vargas appear to have it all. Behind the picture perfect life seen in these rare home videos, jealousy and control issues are abound. But no one thought their marriage would end - in murder.

programme.title: American Monster: A Mother's Work
programme.desc: Never-before-seen home movies reveal the fabulous lifestyle of Lanny and Donna Horwitz raising their only son Radley in their Florida mansion. But when their lives are upended by a ghastly shooting, everyone in this eccentric family becomes a suspect.

programme.title: American Monster: Life of the Party
programme.desc: Doug and Rose quickly strike up a romance and later marry. But behind the perfect façade seen in these exclusive home videos, lies and deceit begin to surface. A no show at Thanksgiving and a box on the roadside lead to a shocking discovery.

programme.title: What Happened to Kortne Stouffer?
programme.desc: In the summer of 2012, Kortne Stouffer vanishes from her bed while a friend sleeps beside her. News of Kortne's disappearance rocks her small Pennsylvania town.

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: The Gentleman Killer
programme.desc: Bronx, NY, 1941: When tea for two becomes a murder of one, investigators from all across New York City must act upon the testimony of a few brave women to bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: Devil's Advocate
programme.desc: St. Paul, MN, 1963: Carol Thompson, church-going wife and devoted mother of four, is found in a bloody heap on her neighbor's doorstep. Now detectives must peel away the layers of her picture-perfect life to reveal the painful secrets the 1960s housewife.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: In Cold Blood
programme.desc: When an unthinkably violent criminal flees before his trial, John Walsh joins local authorities on the chase for Michael Waguespack. Cal uncovers hidden and painful truths in a Christmas Eve tragedy that sent police hunting for Miguel Angel Martinez.

programme.desc: Bronx, NY, 1941: When tea for two becomes a murder of one, investigators from all across New York City must act upon the testimony of a few brave women to bring the killer to justice.

programme.desc: St. Paul, MN, 1963: Carol Thompson, church-going wife and devoted mother of four, is found in a bloody heap on her neighbor's doorstep. Now detectives must peel away the layers of her picture-perfect life to reveal the painful secrets the 1960s housewife.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: In Cold Blood
programme.desc: When an unthinkably violent criminal flees before his trial, John Walsh joins local authorities on the chase for Michael Waguespack. Cal uncovers hidden and painful truths in a Christmas Eve tragedy that sent police hunting for Miguel Angel Martinez.

programme.title: What Happened to Kortne Stouffer?
programme.desc: In the summer of 2012, Kortne Stouffer vanishes from her bed while a friend sleeps beside her. News of Kortne's disappearance rocks her small Pennsylvania town.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Trailing the Devil
programme.desc: A nightmare wreaks havoc on the village of Armada, Michigan when 14-year-old April Millsap is found murdered on the community's most popular bike trail. Very little evidence leaves investigators running down clues to bring this monster to justice.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Prints of Darkness
programme.desc: When Michael and Melisa Augustson move to little Alma, Georgia they're soon taken in by the community. But on December 14th, Michael comes home to a scene of unspeakable horror. His wife has been murdered, and only one person in the town knows why.

programme.title: Deadly Devotion: Murderous Mormons
programme.desc: Two brothers believe they have finally broken free from a dangerous Mormon fundamental cult and its egomaniacal leader. Then, nearly two decades later, a deadly hit from a prison cell brings them right back into the fold.

programme.title: Deadly Devotion: Highway to Hell
programme.desc: When a mysterious biker invites single mother Cynthia Garcia to an exclusive party at the Hells Angels clubhouse, she unwittingly enters a secret and dangerous world… with a sacred code that the outlaw bikers would kill to uphold.

programme.title: Deadly Devotion: Killer Party
programme.desc: Misfit Andre "Angel" Melendez moves to New York City, longing to belong to the outrageous party world of Michael Alig's Club Kids, and instead finds a dark and menacing underground scene where fame and drug addiction have tragic consequences.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Suburban Tragedy
programme.desc: In August 2008, newlywed Sarah Widmer died in one of two ways: either she was taking a bath and drowned, or her husband Ryan killed her. Chris Anderson and Fatima Silva investigate to see if there's enough evidence to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: A Desperate Daughter
programme.desc: A down and out twenty-something is convicted of brutally murdering her parents for money. Now, the convict's cousin has reached out to Chris and Fatima for help, convinced Virginia Twenter is serving time for a crime she did not commit.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Hero or Killer?
programme.desc: In Dayton, Ohio in 1991, 15-year-old David Clark was convicted of setting a house on fire that killed a 12-year-old girl. Now, two of his sisters have called Chris and Fatima in to investigate and help them prove this was a wrongful conviction.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: The Truck Driver's Wife
programme.desc: Perry Mikell admits he was a serial cheater incapable of monogamy, but he insists that doesn't mean he killed his wife in a seedy motel room. Now, Mikell's sister and fiancée have called in Chris Anderson and Fatima Silva to see if they got the wrong man.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: A Dying Plea
programme.desc: 16 years after Jerome Scott was found stabbed to death in his home, police moved in on his ex-wife, Patricia Wright, claiming she killed him out of rage for money. Now, her sister and daughter are on a crusade to prove the wrong person is behind bars.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Convicted by a Hair
programme.desc: In 2011, 19-year old KC Grondin got his first girlfriend, but later that same year, he was charged with her murder. Chris Anderson and Fatima Silva have been called in by KC's passionate parents, who are convinced he was the victim of a rush to judgment.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: High-Stakes Homicide
programme.desc: Pest control worker Kim Cain was convicted of murdering a 71-year-old Palm Beach socialite. The prosecution argued she found Cain stealing her jewelry to support a gambling addiction. Cain's family is hoping Chris and Fatima can prove his innocence.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Kandahar: Against All Odds
programme.desc: 36 U.S Special Forces face a Taliban insurgence 5 times their size. Facing I.E.Ds , RPG's and vicious counter attacks, they fight for their lives to take the hill of Sperwan Ghar, as control of the hill is control of Kandahar.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Hue: Vietnam's Bloodiest Battle
programme.desc: In a final showdown marines must breech the heavily fortified walls of the ancient citadel where thousands of NVA soldiers lie in wait. After one of the bloodiest battles of the entire Vietnam War, the marines are finally victorious.

programme.title: The Mafia Kingpin
programme.desc: Arnold Rothstein schooled the founders of the American Mafia in the ways of organized crime during the 1920s and the the model for running crime business.

programme.title: The Last Don
programme.desc: Joe Massino, the 'Last Don', crushes anyone who goes against the mafia code of omerta. Loyalty to his family, and obedience to their code of silence, is everything. But when the Feds take Massino down, Massino takes everyone down with him.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Santo Trafficante
programme.desc: Florida and Cuba were ruled by top don Santo Trafficante. The King of Cuba's casinos was on the verge of mob stardom when a revolution destroyed his plans. It results in a secret alliance between the mob and the CIA and a failed assassination attempt.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Downfall
programme.desc: The FBI pursues the five families that run organized crime in New York, and what happens when the fate of the two informers is revealed.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Joey Gallo
programme.desc: Crazy Joey Gallo psychopathic killer, beatnik hipster and renegade mobster. Burning with rage and determined to make his way to the top, he wages all-out war against the US gov't and sparks a revolution in the mafia before going down in a hail of bullets.

programme.title: The Mafia Kingpin
programme.desc: Arnold Rothstein schooled the founders of the American Mafia in the ways of organized crime during the 1920s and the the model for running crime business.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: Greatest Tank Battles: Tank Battles of Korea
programme.desc: In 1950 the world is caught off guard as North Korea launches a massive armoured assault into South Korea. This is the story of the American tankers who rush to the aid of the South and the bloody battles they fight up and down the Korean Peninsula.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Battle for Sugar Loaf
programme.desc: Taking an otherwise nondescript hill on the embattled island of Okinawa proved to be one of the most incredible battles of WWII. The young weary marines of Charlie Company strained against the searing Pacific sun to see the top of Sugar Loaf Hill.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Heroes of Tarawa
programme.desc: Everything went wrong in America's first test of whether the Japanese-held islands of the Pacific, the key steppingstones to the doorstep of Japan, could be captured by across-the-beach infantry assaults.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Marines at Hue
programme.desc: The city of Hue, South Vietnam, was the site of one of the fiercest battles of the Vietnam War. Three under-strength U.S. Marine battalions, consisting of fewer than 2,500 men, attacked and soundly defeated overwhelming, entrenched enemy troops.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Tojo: Japan's Razor of Fear
programme.desc: Japanese General, Hideki Tojo, is a cold blooded control freak, who takes millions to their deaths in the dirtiest war ever known. This is the story of the dictator responsible for Pearl Harbor, an Asian Holocaust and the torture of thousands of POWs.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Kim: North Korea's Evil Dynasty
programme.desc: North Korea's evil dictator, Kim Jong-il, ruled his country for 17 years without mercy. While personally enriching himself, he let his people starve to death and threatened to bring the world to the brink of a third world war.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Rocky Mountain Homestead

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cliff House

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Killer Views
programme.desc: A family of four build their dream home overlooking the Atlantic Ocean on the eastern most point in the United States in Lubec, Maine. Later, a pro snowboarder and his wife prepare to move from their yurt in Whitefish to build their off-grid home.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Coastal Maine
programme.desc: Jason and Crystal always wanted an escape in the middle of Maine's secluded coastline for their family to unplug and enjoy nature. With the help of a small group of friends, they set their sights on building a 320-square-foot cabin in just 12 days.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Oyster Farm Shack
programme.desc: Ashley Morrill and her team of builders find themselves rebuilding an old oyster shack for a working oyster farm in Edgecomb, Maine.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Heirloom Home on the Shore
programme.desc: After 40 years of use, third-generation owners have decided to add facilities and living quarters to a family camp for large annual family reunions.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Gathering Place
programme.desc: Chase and his team take on a project on McGrath Pond in Oakland, ME, that has been empty for 15 years. Stephanie bought this place from her father and promised him she would fix it up.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Daggett Camp
programme.desc: Chase and team take on the Daggett Camp, which was owned by a famous Maine politician whose family wants to rehab it in only six weeks. A hidden surprise underneath the cabin threatens to derail the whole project.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Grand Exterior
programme.desc: Nicole makes a spur-of-the-moment bid and wins a house sight-unseen at auction. Nicole visits the six bedroom, three bath manor and falls in love with its historic details and rustic charm.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Powder Room With a Flair
programme.desc: Nicole knows that a ground floor powder room will see a ton of guests.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Grand Dining Room
programme.desc: Nicole tackles the dining room of her Tudor home using custom leaded glass and modern oak flooring.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Rebuild Below
programme.desc: A dark basement that could have easily been overlooked as an unsalvageable and unusable space is transformed into a gorgeous family room.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Grand Living Room
programme.desc: Nicole's newest home is 100 years old, and unsurprisingly the living room needs work from top to bottom. Despite major setbacks, Nicole is up for the challenge.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitchen Overhaul
programme.desc: When it comes to restoring kitchens, Nicole Curtis' rule is that it should look old and work like new. In her Grand Blvd. home, she has to work with a large kitchen that offers little wall space.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Leaky Bedroom Disaster
programme.desc: A fresh window seat, antique glass knobs, and a stairwell re-do get Nicole closer to finishing her grand 2nd floor.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Solarium Refresh
programme.desc: Once a boarded-up eyesore, Nicole's first-floor solarium has the potential to be the best room in the house.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Jack and Jill Suite
programme.desc: With the help of a 1920s mint condition porcelain sink, Nicole is able to transform the Jack and Jill bathroom in her Grand Boulevard home without sacrificing its antique integrity.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Master Bath Overhaul
programme.desc: If Nicole is going to turn the entire third floor of her Grand Boulevard estate into a master suite, a custom new bathroom will have to be the first step.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Rehab Attic
programme.desc: Nicole's 1913 mansion in the heart of Detroit is topped with an old, dusty attic that was once servant's quarters.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Grand Garage
programme.desc: The century-old Tudor house is one thing, but Nicole Curtis also wants to make sure the garage is up to par.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Debates, Decisions, Designer
programme.desc: The leaching bed is replaced at the country house, and work progresses until Mike and MJ find out an open permit remains on the barn. Later, the big day finally arrives when MJ and Lisa get married in a picturesque setting, as long as the rain holds off.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Here We Go Again
programme.desc: After MJ and Lisa's wedding, smooth sailing is wishful thinking as Mike and MJ are welcomed back to the river house by a river of muck. The deck posts and windows get installed as they rush to get the house closed in before the winter weather arrives.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Game Changer
programme.desc: Mike's vision for open concept at the suburban house hits a structural snag and MJ attempts to rein him in before the budget takes another hit. A fun surprise awaits the team at the river house, until Mike throws another curveball at MJ.

programme.title: Good Eats: The Alton Crown Affair
programme.desc: Alton Brown proves that crown roast of lamb can be a dish to shock and awe.

programme.title: Good Eats: Ginger: Rise of the Rhizome
programme.desc: When a fairy tale figure seeks host Alton Brown's help in spicing up his personality, it leads to the exploration of that zesty rhizome ginger.

programme.title: Good Eats: Et Tu Mame
programme.desc: That culinary chameleon the soybean turns up as edamame when host Alton Brown takes it from the sushi bar and into the kitchen.

programme.title: Good Eats: Tuna, Surprise!
programme.desc: Alton Brown raises the bar on canned tuna beyond the usual casserole or tuna sandwich.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Morimoto vs. Chauhan

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweet Mash-Ups
programme.desc: We take a bite out of some of the sweetest mash-ups in the Big Apple.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: London: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Andrew highlights the iconic British dishes and ethnically diverse foods that have put London on the culinary map, from humble shepherd's pie and posh beef Wellington to sizzling seekh kebabs and smoky Jamaican jerk chicken.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Dominican Republic
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern takes a culinary tour of the Dominican Republic, a meat-lover's paradise. From whole roast pig and crispy, Lebanese-inspired fried dough pockets to beef and plantain casseroles, Dominican gastronomy is full of surprises.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern uncovers the boardwalk indulgences of the Jersey Shore. From sticky-sweet saltwater taffy, to slices of tomato pie and Italian subs, the Jersey Shore's culinary scene is a carnival for the taste buds.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Quito
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the diverse culinary classics of Ecuador's capital city, Quito. The urban cuisine satisfies stomachs with fried pork and potato cakes, fresh ceviche, sugar-coated roasted peanuts, fish soup and more.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Atlanta
programme.desc: In the modern city known for its southern hospitality, Atlanta's comfort food is king. From fried chicken and peach cobbler to soul food and sweet tea, Andrew Zimmern explores the iconic eats that keep the hungry heading south.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mexico City
programme.desc: Mexico City has the most people of any city in the western hemisphere, and they all love to eat. Home to some of the best street food on Earth, Andrew Zimmern explores tasty traditions like barbacoa, chicharrone and huarache.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: The Nightmare Delivery
programme.desc: Molly plunges into a scuba dog diving cake while baker Ben creates an edible beer barrel cake with a working tap. Meanwhile, Karisha faces her worst delivery yet.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Holograms Take the Cake
programme.desc: Detail master Suzanne individually hand-sculpts 500 realistic sugar flowers and Eloise goes round-and-round bringing magic to a one-year old's birthday party.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Jaw-Dropping Fantasy Cakes
programme.desc: A baker takes on a cake of Jurassic proportions for a group of movie super fans, and a 30th birthday calls for an elaborate dessert that brings a woodland creature to life.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Massive Mega Cakes
programme.desc: A bride is speechless when her wedding cake starts to build on itself and then a mystical beast comes to life, complete with massive wings and sharp talons.

programme.title: Cake Wars: Powerpuff Girls
programme.desc: Blossom, Bubbles and Buttercup fly into 'Cake Wars' to celebrate the iconic animated series 'The Powerpuff Girls!' Four bakers need their own superpowers as they compete to have their amazing cake at the centre of the party and take home the prize.

programme.title: UFC Main Event: Jedrzejczyk vs. Gadelha 2
programme.desc: Strawweight champion Joanna Jedrzejczyk and challenger Claudia Gadelha's shared history gave rise to an intense rivalry. Follow the path from their first fight through a season as coaches on The Ultimate Fighter, then see the exciting rematch.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: What Lies Beneath: The Mick Fanning Story
programme.desc: Mick Fanning survived a shark attack on live television and that's just where his story begins.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Owen and Haatchi
programme.desc: This is a story about a boy and his dog. But not just any boy, and not just any dog.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Love Is Stronger
programme.desc: An exclusive interview with Chris Singleton, a 19-year old outfielder for Charleston Southern University, whose mother and eight others were shot and killed in the Charleston Emanuel AME church massacre in 2015.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: 20 Years and 11 Seconds: The Travis Roy Story
programme.desc: Tom Rinaldi visits former Boston University hockey player Travis Roy, whose life was forever changed just 11 seconds into his first shift for the Terriers.

programme.title: Backstory: Serena vs. The Umpire
programme.desc: A look at the saga of Serena Williams' intense clash with chair umpire Carlos Ramos during her loss to Naomi Osaka in the 2018 US Open women's final.

programme.title: Backstory: Banned For Life*
programme.desc: Don Van Natta Jr. examines Major League Baseball’s punishments of 'Shoeless' Joe Jackson and Pete Rose with new reporting and fresh interviews, exploring what’s changed since they were each banned from the sport.

programme.title: SportsCenter Top Ten
programme.desc: A countdown of the top ten plays of the month.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Catching Kayla
programme.desc: Tom Rinaldi tells the remarkable story of Kayla Montgomery who, despite being diagnosed with multiple sclerosis, has become one of the best distance runners in the country.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Paradise: From the Ashes
programme.desc: The emotional journey of the Paradise High School football team, one year removed from the wildfires that scorched their town and claimed 86 lives. E:60 follows the Paradise Bobcats on their path to rebuild.

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: Miami: The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: The newly minted BAPS tour searches for a road manager. Trina and Joy convince Trick to sweat it out. An argument between Miami Tip and Saucy Santana puts Sukihana in the middle. Premadonna gets some information about Amara's man from an old friend.

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: December to Remember
programme.desc: Olivia returns to New York to revive her music career but must confront Chrissy and Rich first. Yandy's prison reform protest in Mississippi could jeopardize Mendeecees' release. Remy's new legal troubles may send her back to prison.

programme.title: Movie: Matching Hearts
programme.desc: As Valentine's Day nears, a matchmaker is tasked by her mentor to find a match for an entrepreneur who believes staying single is the key to success.

programme.title: Movie: My One and Only

programme.title: When Calls the Heart: The Heart of a Father

programme.title: When Hope Calls: From the Ashes

programme.title: Movie: Love and Sunshine
programme.desc: A woman fosters a retired military dog, while recovering from her broken engagement. When the dog's trainer returns home to claim his pup, she finds just what she looking for to mend her broken heart.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Flu Attack (aka The Flu)

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Job Hunting

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blind Ambitions
programme.desc: Rose's sister, Lily, can't accept the fact that now that she's blind, she needs help.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Big Daddy

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Way We Met

programme.title: The Golden Girls: End of the Curse
programme.desc: Blanche is mortified after taking a pregnancy test which indicates she's pregnant. Then after visiting her doctor, she learns the truth, she's beginning menopause.

programme.title: Frasier: And the Dish Ran Away With the Spoon

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy and Bob Hope
programme.desc: Lucy tells Bob Hope she will not appear with him on Ricky's show because she is a jinx.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Ladies of the Evening

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Take Him, He's Mine
programme.desc: Dorothy dumps a depressed Stan on Blanche so that she can go out with a naval officer.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: It's a Miserable Life
programme.desc: The girls petition to save an old oak tree on the property of a hateful woman.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Isn't it Romantic
programme.desc: Dorothy's old friend, Jean comes to Miami for a visit and Dorothy decides not to tell Blanche and Rose that Jean is a lesbian. Then, after spending time with Rose, Jean begins to fall for her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Big Daddy's Little Lady
programme.desc: Blanche's dad announces he's remarrying; Rose and Dorothy enter a song-writing contest.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Family Affair

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Sit down with actors Pascale Hutton and Kavan Smith from the Hallmark Channel original series 'When Calls the Heart'. Food and lifestyle expert Chadwick Boyd comes for a visit.

programme.title: Movie: Love on a Limb
programme.desc: A woman takes it up herself to try and save a beloved oak tree after the mayor hires a handsome landscaper to cut it down. She chains herself to it and as the landscaper attempts to wait her out, the tree brings them more than they could have imagined.

programme.title: Movie: Wedding Crashers

programme.desc: Meredith and George suddenly find themselves at odds at work. Bailey, although technically on maternity leave, finds herself treating Addison for an unusual feminine issue. Alex finds himself oddly jealous when Izzie pays more attention to Denny.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Band-Aid Covers the Bullet Hole
programme.desc: While Derek and Addison attempt to come to terms with their relationship, Cristina's day takes a turn for the worse when Bailey instructs her to take care of her baby. Meanwhile, Denny continues to be an obstacle in Alex's attempt to get closer to Izzie.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Superstition
programme.desc: When a series of deaths occur at Seattle Grace, Izzie becomes very nervous about Denny's surgery. Meanwhile, Derek and Addison discuss making a more permanent living arrangement, and Richard treats a very special old friend.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Under Pressure

programme.desc: When a boy is found dead in a cornfield, traces of water from his body help lead investigators to the boy's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bag of Evidence

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Charged Up
programme.desc: Philadelphia authorities use an anonymous letter to locate a perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fatal Fungus
programme.desc: In Cleveland, more than thirty cases of people suffering from bleeding lungs were reported in the span of a few months. Doctors had never seen anything like it, and searched frantically for the cause and a cure.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Examining the cyanide-laced Excedrin killings of 1986, where two people died. When the killer was caught, theirs was the first conviction after federal laws against product tampering were instituted after the Chicago Tylenol murders.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer's 'Cattle' Log
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called to retrieve a dead body, they do a background check on the victim. The trail leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skin of Her Teeth
programme.desc: A human skull retrieved from a watery grave reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate deep knife wounds. The teeth had been removed from the skull, apparently so the killer could keep the victim's identity a secret.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Common Thread
programme.desc: The year was 1984, and a serial killer was on the loose in Florida. Eight women had been found dead. At each crime scene, investigators found tiny red fibers, fibers they hoped would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Dirty Deed
programme.desc: Eileen and Derrick Severs disappeared from their home in the small village of Hambleton in Great Britain, and police found evidence which suggested foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: A fire leads investigators to re-examine an unusual death.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: On the Rocks
programme.desc: The naked body of a young woman is discovered in a remote area leading forensic investigators on a search for clues to her identity and the identity of her killer.

programme.desc: When a Yale student mysteriously vanishes days before her wedding investigators comb a secure research lab for clues.

programme.desc: A suitcase leads to the gruesome discovery of a nearly perfect crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: An unknown assailant walked into a retail store and fired three shots, killing the owner. Police had suspects, but all of them had alibis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Forever Hold Your Peace
programme.desc: When a young man confessed to the rape and murder of a woman in a restaurant, police were convinced the case was solved. Eight years later, another man imprisoned for an unrelated crime, admitted he committed the murder.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Stalked on the Savannah
programme.desc: In a punishing Brazilian savannah, survivalists Wes and Jesse deal with searing heat as well as paralyzing wasps, aggressive bees, and poisonous rattlesnakes. Starvation forces Jesse to attack a beehive in search of honey and the entire colony retaliates.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Bite Club
programme.desc: A survivor of rattlesnake, shark and bear attacks teams with Brooke, wife of 'Naked and Afraid' veteran Matt Wright, in a vicious African feeding ground. Then, a haunted Colombian jungle tests survivalists with threats from predators and the supernatural.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Uncensored: Twinning Pt. 2
programme.desc: With extra footage and bonus scenes: Identical twin sisters Amber and Serena, as well as brothers Warren and Thomas, struggle to survive the African savannah. They take on rhinos, hyenas and a territorial leopard stalking their camp.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Little Person, Big Challenge

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Alone: Bugging Out
programme.desc: In the darkness of the Belize jungle, all-star survivalist Kim Kelly is hammered by torrential downpours, relentless ticks, and terrifying howler monkeys. Kim quickly spirals into sleep deprivation which puts her at risk in the unrelenting jungle.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: The Darkest Hour
programme.desc: Mountain man Joe, and former cop Andrea take on Namibia. This vast land is home to dangerous predators, including the deadly hippopotamus. But it's her inner demons that threaten Andrea's survival.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus, tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Shame of Water

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Scaredy Cat

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rock Botton
programme.desc: The guys 'do the farts' with actor Jeff Daniels, and then try to get strangers to take their sides in ridiculous arguments. Later, tonight's loser finds himself up against a wall around a group of college students.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Down in the Dump
programme.desc: Find out what objects other than pencils the Jokers have considered putting on people, and whose sister frequently helps on the show. Plus, learn what prop has become a fan favorite.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Q-Pay

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Remember the Pact

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Take Me Out at the Ballgame

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Ron and Tammy: Part Two
programme.desc: Tom tries to get back at Ron by going on a date with his ex-wife, Tammy. Leslie tries to prevent Ron from falling for Tammy's charming ways.

programme.desc: Leslie takes the whole department camping in order to brainstorm new ideas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Northeast Feast

programme.title: The Golden Girls: All Bets Are Off
programme.desc: Dorothy risks everything when she lets her gambling problem get out of control.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blanche Delivers
programme.desc: Blanche's daughter wants to give birth in a birthing center while Blanche is preoccupied by the possibility of Rebecca delivering in a local hospital. Blanche doesn't want to be embarrassed by the fact that her daughter was artificially inseminated.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Knee Jerk
programme.desc: Doug enjoys the extra attention Carrie gives him after he falls down the stairs and injures a knee. He then comes up with a plan for the pampering to continue even after he is healed.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Present Tense
programme.desc: When the Heffernans receive an oil painting of themselves as an anniversary gift from Deacon and Kelly, they dislike the picture so much that they decide to stage a robbery rather than hang the painting in their home.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Emotional Rollercoaster
programme.desc: Doug lies to Carrie and tells her that he regrets not accomplishing more in life and that he's going to sign up for the IPS management program. Meanwhile, Deacon, Arthur and Spence have a wonderful time at the amusement park riding 'Goliath.'

programme.title: The King of Queens: Four Play
programme.desc: When Doug realizes he has more in common with Deacon's wife than Deacon, he and Kelley start hanging out together. Meanwhile, Arthur feels betrayed by the coffee shop girl, Gloria, who is having great success by taking Arthur's relationship advice.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Hartford Wailer
programme.desc: Carrie convinces her female co-workers to blow off a company retreat and take advantage of the hotel's spa. However, her plans are put into jeopardy when Doug surprises her and wants to spend the weekend watching the Planet of the Apes series.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Fight Schlub
programme.desc: When Doug starts hanging out with Joe, a driver at Priority Plus, his fellow drivers lose all respect for him. Later, Doug discovers that Joe was only acting like his friend to get him alone so that he and his fellow drivers could play a trick on Doug.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Acting Out
programme.desc: When Carries decides to put Arthur in a retirement home, Doug is delighted with the prospect of getting his basement back, so he can turn it into a media room. Meanwhile, Danny and Spence refuse to change bedrooms and a classic standoff begins.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Mama Cast
programme.desc: When Carrie asks Doug to find an investment for their tax return, she's shocked when he comes home with his very own ice cream truck. Meanwhile, when Carrie is asked to stand in as a 'mom' at a model home, she starts to warm up to the idea of being a mom.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Moxie Moron
programme.desc: Doug takes on a supervisory role at IPS just to prove to Carrie that he's not content with being a driver for the rest of his life. Meanwhile, Carrie decides to show her bosses that she has moxie by complaining about the company holiday gift.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Major Disturbance
programme.desc: While reading a bedtime story to Deacon's son, Doug changes the ending to make it a little scarier and ends up traumatizing the boy. Meanwhile, Arthur offers himself up as a passenger for hire so people can ride in the carpool lane.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Pilot
programme.desc: Commercial jingle writer Charlie Harper is surprised when his uptight brother, Alan, and Alan's 10-year-old son Jake ask to stay temporarily with him at his beach house. Charlie soon bonds with Jake, and the temporary arrangement becomes more permanent.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Big Flappy Bastards
programme.desc: Charlie gives Jake the cold shoulder after he lures seagulls into the house. Meanwhile, Alan gets a surprise from Judith when he offers to fix her sprinklers.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Go East on Sunset Until You Reach the Gates of Hell
programme.desc: Charlie takes Alan out on the town after Alan's fun-filled father/son weekend plans backfire. Too many drinks soon lead Charlie and Alan to confront their mother.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: If I Can't Write My Chocolate Song, I'm Going to Take a Nap
programme.desc: When Charlie's longtime cleaning lady quits, Alan is sent to lure her back. Meanwhile, Alan asks Charlie to get Jake ready for Judith.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Last Thing You Want Is to Wind Up With a Hump
programme.desc: After a wild night in Vegas, Charlie reluctantly attends Jake's soccer game where he discovers the hidden dating potentials.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Did You Check With the Captain of the Flying Monkeys?
programme.desc: Charlie rethinks his ways after he, Alan and Jake must cheer up a dejected Evelyn. Meanwhile, Charlie teaches Jake some lessons about screening calls from women.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Ruff Goin'
programme.desc: When Doug and Carrie are not invited to their block party, Doug makes an appearance to prove they are good people, but ends up having to adopt a dog from his neighbour in order to prove it. Meanwhile, Arthur offers to help Danny with his gambling problem.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Brace Yourself
programme.desc: When Deacon's son draws a picture of Arthur with crooked teeth, Arthur convinces Doug and Carrie to pay for new braces. However, when Doug attempts to use a similar strategy on Carrie, his plan backfires. Meanwhile, Spence is hired as a cook and maid.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Home Cheapo
programme.desc: When Carrie learns that Deacon and Kelly bought a second home, she convinces Doug that they were able to afford it because they are so cheap.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Offensive Fowl
programme.desc: Carrie is supportive at first of Doug's cleaner approach to life, but quickly grows tired of him trying to force his new beliefs on her and having to eat meat while in private.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: RAD!
programme.desc: Erica thinks all of her singing dreams are going to come true when she lands a job at the new karoke bar in town. But when she's tasked with bringing in more customers, will Erica regret turning to Beverly for help?

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Hersheypark
programme.desc: Adam discovers Beverly has been manipulating him with guilt letters when he tells his mother he doesn't want her to chaperone the school trip to Hershey Park. Meanwhile, after attending Career Night, Geoff realizes he doesn't want to be an eye doctor.

programme.title: The Zoo: Grumpy Cats' New Digs
programme.desc: Iray, a red ruffed lemur, is rushed to the health center when keepers discover a wound on his leg. A new exhibit is built for the Pallas's cats, the original grumpy cats. Plus, seven adorable baby turtles join the zoo's colony of an endangered species.

programme.title: The Zoo: Taming of the Shrew
programme.desc: Cardiologists try to determine why the geladas are experiencing a life-threatening heart condition. Keepers shift the Nile crocodiles off exhibit for a maintenance project. Later, after a shaky start, the elephant shrews are breeding.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Baby Otter Rescue
programme.desc: The team welcomes two rescued southern sea otter pups, Mara and Gibson, from the California coast. Young ruddy ducks arrive at the aquarium and are introduced to their new habitat. Nandi, the aquarium's smallest manta ray, is due for her annual checkup.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Ophelia the Octopus
programme.desc: Two rescued sea lions arrive at the aquarium, and trainers help prepare them for an upcoming eye surgery. The team travels to the Bahamas to research the effects of plastics in the ocean on sharks. The aquarium conducts a study to help wild beluga whales.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Coral Super Bowl
programme.desc: The staff becomes concerned when Zola, the beloved African penguin falls mysteriously ill. Later, the aquarium witnesses the annual spawning of an endangered coral species, while Maggie the False Map turtle has a date with the dentist.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Unfiltered: Big Is Beautiful
programme.desc: After eating all his tank mate’s food, Tank the hungry sea turtle finds a space to eat in peace. Two beluga whales are welcomed to their new home at the aquarium, and Scarlett the lovable sea lion turns two.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Submerged: Sea Lion Love
programme.desc: Love is in the air for a trainer and his favorite sea lion pup, Scarlett, who was born at the aquarium. A sweet beluga whale trains with staff to go on the 'whale scale,' and young African penguins prepare for an upcoming event.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Last Primates of Madagascar
programme.desc: For some 100 million years the flora and fauna of Madagascar have evolved utterly independent of the rest of the world. Steve travels to this unique biosphere to leap with lemurs, a rare, ancient species of primate.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Super Fluffy Puppies
programme.desc: Three litters of puppies go from cute to cuter during the first few months of their lives.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Guilt Stricken Guardian
programme.desc: Jackson needs to find a way to help a distressed Philly cat named Dale whose uncontrollable peeing is driving a wedge between his guardians. It proves nearly impossible for Jackson to get a guilt stricken guardian to stop feeding her diabetic cat Lasagna.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Family Reunion
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff helps a puppy with a mysterious and painful injury. Shelter volunteers drive from Kansas hoping Dr. Jeff's team can save a tiny rescued dog hit by a car. And the team travel to Tennessee to help Jeff's cousin provide free vet care.

programme.title: The Vet Life: 16-Pound Tumour
programme.desc: Dr. Lavigne performs a risky surgery on a loving pit bull with a record-breaking tumour. Dr. Ross examines a rescue pigeon turned pet and an aspiring vet student joins Dr. Blue at Cy-Fair. The doctors deal with a heartbreaking situation at the clinic.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Robert's Baby Kangaroo
programme.desc: While Bindi and the keepers ready Sophie the baby giraffe for her first steps into her enclosure, Robert helps to hand-raise another baby: Melman the kangaroo. Terri oversees a health check for one of the zoo's favourite characters, Ravi the red panda.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Mate for Life
programme.desc: The health and love life of Chester's Penguin Island's oldest penguin could be in jeopardy. One of the zoo's most dangerous families is on the move and keepers prepare to welcome two orphan sun bears to the zoo.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Eagle Has Landed
programme.desc: A pregnant African wild dog has the staff anxiously preparing for the big day, zoo director Jim Breheny steps in to help a keeper learn how to handle a golden eagle and a new tree in Jungle World gives the gibbons a new world to explore.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Village of Wolves
programme.desc: Villalobos is tested like never before when Tia and her crew are called upon to rescue a pack of wolf-dog hybrids abandoned by a backyard breeder. With law enforcement threatening to kill the dogs, the pressure is higher than ever.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Left for Dead
programme.desc: Tia races to rescue an emaciated puppy chained to an abandoned home. A couple visits VRC in hope of finding a younger sibling for their dog. And a Good Samaritan needs help rescuing a stray mama dog still bleeding three weeks after giving birth.

programme.title: Movie: The Best Man Holiday
programme.desc: Old rivalries and old flames are rekindled when a group of college friends reunite at Christmas, after 15 years.

programme.title: Movie: Madea's Family Reunion
programme.desc: While planning a family reunion, Madea finds herself plagued by family trouble, including her sister's death, a niece's wedding to a handsome, but abusive man and a troubled and angry court appointed ward.

programme.title: Movie: Diary of a Mad Black Woman

programme.desc: A married couple owns a wine bar and loves to entertain, but their home's not quite ready for guests due to its compartmentalized layout, unstable balconies and an enormous, rotting tree.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Classic Colonial Meets Modern-Day Makeover

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Surprise Renovation for First-Time Homeowner
programme.desc: A new homeowner's first place needs work, so her parents recruit Dave and Jenny to pull off a surprise renovation while she's out of town. The Marrs race the clock to create a quaint, warm and welcoming home that matches the homeowner's tastes perfectly.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Century-old Farmhouse Becomes New Forever Home

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Outdated to Modern
