programme.title: The 2000s: A New Reality: Things Get Real
programme.desc: Topics include: the launch of the iPhone; the birth of social media; Michael Jackson's death; US troops deployed to Iraq; the housing bubble swells and then bursts; Lehman brothers fails and the global financial crash is triggered; man-mad climate change.

programme.title: The 2000s: A New Reality: Chaos and Crisis
programme.desc: Topics include: the tragedy of the Kursk; the rise of reality shows like 'Survivor;' the 'summer of the shark;' the attack on the U.S.S. Cole by Al Qaeda; the tragedy of 9/11 and how America came to terms with it and learned to laugh again.

programme.title: The 2000s: A New Reality: Moment of Truth
programme.desc: Topics include: the tsunami of 2004; the triumphant capture of Saddam Hussein; Janet Jackson's 'wardrobe malfunction' at the Super Bowl halftime show; the creation of YouTube; 'Queer Eye for the Straight Guy;' Hurricane Katrina and the government failure.

programme.title: The '80s: The Decade That Made Us: Lift Off
programme.desc: See how the '80s created our modern world including the revolution in personal entertainment brought on by Pac-Man and Sony Walkmans while a new kid on the block defined a new musical era - spelled 'MTV.'

programme.title: The '80s: The Decade That Made Us: The Revolutionaries
programme.desc: Reagan's business mandate leads to a new breed of entrepreneurs, including Steve Jobs, whose '1984' ad helped launch the Super Bowl commercial craze and Ted Turner, who invented the 24-hour news network.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Pol Veterinary Services welcomes it newest member to the family.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Mommy Reindeerest
programme.desc: Early springtime in Michigan means mothers, including Diane Pol, are being celebrated across the state.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Peacock-a-doodle-do
programme.desc: Spring is on the horizon in central Michigan and with it comes new life.

programme.title: How It's Made: Pewter Flasks; Potato Salad; Hydrogen Fuel Cells; Engineered Wood Siding
programme.desc: Learn what goes into making pewter flasks, potato salad, hydrogen fuel cells and engineered wood siding.

programme.title: How It's Made: Balloons, Wallpaper, Frozen French Fries, Incandescent Light Bulbs
programme.desc: Follow the production of balloons, wallpaper, frozen french fries and incandescent light bulbs.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Armageddon Highway
programme.desc: A strange Cuban prison, an eerie escape route built for Armageddon, and an underwater marvel that changed history are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Sea Fortress of Doom
programme.desc: A terrifying sea fortress, a highway in the Amazon that suddenly vanishes, and a mysterious structure in the shadow of the Statue of Liberty are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Arctic Hell Pit
programme.desc: Traces of a Russian hole to hell in the Arctic, a military base in America's Wild West, and a strange looming tower are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Labyrinth of the Dead
programme.desc: Tunnels filled with human bones lie beneath the streets of Paris, and this horrifying engineering marvel points to a dark secret. New discoveries reveal why this grisly underground death maze was built, and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Titanic's Lost Sister
programme.desc: When a sister ship of the Titanic gets embroiled in war with a hidden enemy, the former luxury liner is sent to the bottom of the ocean; new discoveries and cutting-edge underwater technology might finally reveal the secret history of its sinking.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Unexplained Encounters
programme.desc: Strange sightings of mysterious lights and orbs are common in the Bermuda Triangle, and to find the truth behind these unexplained phenomena, experts follow new clues to underwater alien anomalies that some believe have ties to the lost city of Atlantis.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Aliens in the Triangle
programme.desc: New evidence could finally explain a mysterious UFO encounter in the Bermuda Triangle. Using cutting-edge tech and the latest underwater discoveries, a team of experts investigate if aliens have visited this strange stretch of water.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Titanic's Lost Sister
programme.desc: When a sister ship of the Titanic gets embroiled in war with a hidden enemy, the former luxury liner is sent to the bottom of the ocean; new discoveries and cutting-edge underwater technology might finally reveal the secret history of its sinking.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Unexplained Encounters
programme.desc: Strange sightings of mysterious lights and orbs are common in the Bermuda Triangle, and to find the truth behind these unexplained phenomena, experts follow new clues to underwater alien anomalies that some believe have ties to the lost city of Atlantis.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Aliens in the Triangle
programme.desc: New evidence could finally explain a mysterious UFO encounter in the Bermuda Triangle. Using cutting-edge tech and the latest underwater discoveries, a team of experts investigate if aliens have visited this strange stretch of water.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Labyrinth of the Dead
programme.desc: Tunnels filled with human bones lie beneath the streets of Paris, and this horrifying engineering marvel points to a dark secret. New discoveries reveal why this grisly underground death maze was built, and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Unearthed: Dark Secrets of the Pyramid
programme.desc: New evidence could help solve some of the Great Pyramid's greatest mysteries. Follow the investigation into how it was built, revealing the truth behind its hidden tombs and deepest secrets.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hidden City of the Incas
programme.desc: The lost city of Machu Picchu is one of the greatest mysteries in archaeology. Scientists do not know why this city in the clouds was built, but investigations into secret Inca codes and deformed skeletons might finally reveal its ultimate mystery.

programme.title: Unearthed: Sex, Lies, and the Taj Mahal
programme.desc: The Taj Mahal is one of the world's most beautiful monuments, but new investigations reveal its dark secrets. Scientists are uncovering codes that tell a shocking story of power and betrayal, challenging everything we thought we knew about the Taj Mahal.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost Temples of the Jungle
programme.desc: New technologies reveal the startling truth behind the largest temple ever built, Angkor Wat. Accompany experts as they uncover how this colossal structure was constructed and why one of the largest cities in the world was suddenly abandoned.

programme.title: Unearthed: Treasures of the Terracotta Army
programme.desc: The Terracotta Army is one of China's greatest treasures, but there are still dark secrets surrounding this super-tomb. Newly discovered artifacts reveal the soldiers' supernatural enemy, and human remains point to ancient China's violent origins.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Secret History of the Juno Mission
programme.desc: NASA's Juno mission is the closest we've ever explored Jupiter, and its incredible images reveal the gas giant's deepest secrets and how this deadly world helped create our solar system.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Wrath of the Sun
programme.desc: Experts are uncovering the deadly secrets of our solar system's star, and revealing the apocalyptic threat it could possibly present to life on Earth.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Secret History of Jupiter
programme.desc: Recent discoveries by NASA's Juno mission reveal new secrets about Jupiter, a strange world that is more like a star than a planet. As scientists uncover what lies beneath its violent storms, our understanding of the solar system could change forever.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Secret History of the Voyager Mission
programme.desc: Voyager has had a profound effect on our knowledge of the cosmos. Its mission was supposed to last five years but remains ongoing, changing our understanding of the solar system. With contributions from key scientists, we explore what happens next.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Search for Alien Earths
programme.desc: Astronomers and researchers are on the hunt for the groundbreaking discovery that confirms extraterrestrial life. Using state-of-the-art technology like the Kepler telescope, scientists examine thousands of exoplanets in search of another Earth.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: The Universe's Greatest Hits
programme.desc: A new breed of explorers is risking their careers, and even their lives, to lead humanity to worlds we have never seen. From the beginning of our Solar System to the evolution of the Universe, these heroes are tackling the mysteries of life itself.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: I Just Wanted My Burger
programme.desc: The A.T.T.F. is on the prowl in Newark, New Jersey and they have plenty to keep them busy. First they get a work out when a perp takes off running, later they recover a stolen tractor trailer and a stolen car at a drive-thru window.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: It's Job Security
programme.desc: Task force patrols the streets at night incognito to track down unsuspecting thieves.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: They're Hitting the Highway
programme.desc: A stolen vehicle is found abandoned, rolling backwards down the street.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: I Was Gonna Go Home
programme.desc: The team tracks a stolen vehicle, blocks it in, and captures a gang member.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Perfect Storm
programme.desc: Detectives track a fugitive wanted for the second-degree rape of a young woman barely out of high school.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Hot and Cold
programme.desc: Officers nab a parole violator who raped a nine-year old and search for a fugitive wanted for violating parole on a manslaughter conviction.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Unthinkable
programme.desc: Officers search for a sex offender on the run, and aim to find him before sunrise.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Scarred for Life
programme.desc: Detectives hunt down a dangerous woman on the run after she slashed a former friend in the face with a box cutter.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Bail Out, Bail Out
programme.desc: An officer gets involved in a foot chase across the highway; the force uses a man's cigarettes to arrest him for theft.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Saturday Night
programme.desc: A deliveryman has his car stolen at gunpoint, and the unit uses a decoy vehicle to try to catch the suspects. The Unit changes their schedule to catch the thieves off guard.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: I Don't Think I Can Make It in Jail
programme.desc: The Task Force acquires a new piece of equipment and finds it to be very helpful. Later, the A.T.T.F helps the Newark police catch an armed robbery vehicle.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: It's the Brick Bandit!
programme.desc: The Task Force chases the 'Brick bandit' who leaves bricks in the car he steals. An officer has to take down a suspect by himself during a tense night.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: 15 Years Running
programme.desc: In 1993 a man was convicted of selling narcotics in South Carolina. He had already been incarcerated for a similar charge before and, not wanting to return to prison, failed to show up to serve his time.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Roxanne's First Fugitive
programme.desc: Detective Roxanne Lopez has two conflicting tips about where a sexual offender may be.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: The Bronx Boys
programme.desc: Two friends from the South Bronx go on a crime spree that is increasingly more violent with each offence.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Ticking Time Bomb
programme.desc: Detectives are assigned a parolee who's on the most wanted list, and perform a building-to-building search for the man.

programme.title: American Justice: The Monster Inside
programme.desc: In a controversial case, rapist Rex Allen Krebs was found guilty of murder in 2001.

programme.title: American Justice: Free to Murder Again
programme.desc: The case of Kenneth McDuff, the most infamous sexual predator in Texas history, sent to death row for three murders.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Dreams and Nightmares
programme.desc: The first responders deal with a rash of scary calls, including a man suffering from amnesia after getting hit by a car and a woman who fell off a roof.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Heroes Among Us
programme.desc: When the men and women serving New Orleans get word that one of their own has been critically injured, they reflect on the risks they all take.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Sergeant Joe McHale and his tactical team are called in to coax an unstable man out of his hotel room after he stabs a hotel employee. But when the man turns the knife on himself, McHale and his squad must act quickly to save a life.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Officer Tim Davis' morning run is interrupted by a barricaded gunman who has taken two women hostages, his sister and his girlfriend. Then the already nerve-racking domestic dispute grows even more tense when gunshots ring out inside the home.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: It's a tense situation as Sgt. Paul Hamilton and his squad get caught up in a high-speed car chase to bring down a suspected auto theft ring. Later, Paul's squad joins Huth's to double their efforts and hit two houses at once.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: SWAT team negotiator Jake Byas faces the toughest challenge of his career: dealing with an armed murder suspect barricaded on a ledge who's threatening to kill himself and anyone who tries to get him down; another team surrounds the home of a drug dealer.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Loose Lips
programme.desc: In February 1990, 18-year-old Craig White gets into a truck with his cousin Jesse Watkins and is never seen again. The case goes cold, but after 17 years police suddenly arrest Jesse for Craig's murder.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: The Code
programme.desc: Rap star Corey 'C-Murder' Miller was convicted of killing one of his fans after a fight broke out at a crowded nightclub. Chris Anderson and Fatima Silva have been called in by C-Murder's family to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Lies or Alibis
programme.desc: Scott Davis' past caught up to him when he found himself on trial for murdering his estranged wife's new boyfriend 10 years earlier. Now his family has called in Chris Anderson and Fatima Silva to investigate what they believe is a miscarriage of justice.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Last Blanco
programme.desc: Michael Blanco never doubted the violent things his mother did were to keep their family safe until one day he learned the truth.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Black Sabbath
programme.desc: On Holy Saturday morning, one day before Sister Margaret Ann Pahl's 72nd birthday, she is viciously murdered in the chapel where she works. Police mount an investigation that will unearth the shocking lies and sadistic secrets leading to her death.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Almost Got Away With It
programme.desc: Timothy Bass had gotten away with murder for decades, telling his wife, Gina, that he enjoyed working the night shift to make extra money. For years, Gina believed him until she uncovered his secret and was left wondering what evil her husband had done.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Nights I Don't Remember
programme.desc: On the mornings when Joylynn Martinez couldn't remember the night before, she always told herself that she must have had too much to drink. She never suspected that her own husband, Robert Howard Bruce, was responsible or that he was just getting started.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Was a Good Man to Me
programme.desc: When Alvin "Bud" Brown was arrested he told an officer that he was just like Hannibal Lecter. But, to his wife, Jackie, the man she shared a bed with for years appeared to be gentle and loving until the Thanksgiving Day when she discovered the truth.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Almost Got Away With It
programme.desc: Timothy Bass had gotten away with murder for decades, telling his wife, Gina, that he enjoyed working the night shift to make extra money. For years, Gina believed him until she uncovered his secret and was left wondering what evil her husband had done.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Nights I Don't Remember
programme.desc: On the mornings when Joylynn Martinez couldn't remember the night before, she always told herself that she must have had too much to drink. She never suspected that her own husband, Robert Howard Bruce, was responsible or that he was just getting started.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Was a Good Man to Me
programme.desc: When Alvin "Bud" Brown was arrested he told an officer that he was just like Hannibal Lecter. But, to his wife, Jackie, the man she shared a bed with for years appeared to be gentle and loving until the Thanksgiving Day when she discovered the truth.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Black Sabbath
programme.desc: On Holy Saturday morning, one day before Sister Margaret Ann Pahl's 72nd birthday, she is viciously murdered in the chapel where she works. Police mount an investigation that will unearth the shocking lies and sadistic secrets leading to her death.

programme.title: Suspicion: The Boogeyman
programme.desc: When Joe Gere hears of a serial killer on the loose, he immediately packs up his family and moves. But even in their new home, Joe is vigilant, and teaches his kids to shoot and defend themselves. But it's not long before he gets the call he's dreaded.

programme.title: Suspicion: Murder in Montana
programme.desc: The small farming community of Poplar Montana are stunned at the discovery of the bludgeoned body of 17 year old Kim Nees. But nothing will prepare them for the surprise confession that sends eternal shockwaves through the town.

programme.title: Suspicion: Cosy Cove Killings
programme.desc: In 2007 Monique Murdoch's lakeside idyll is shattered when an intruder steals her daughter's underwear. However this is just a start, young women go missing and fear stalks the Canadian countryside.

programme.title: Suspicion: Designing Murder
programme.desc: In 1984 a beautiful and intelligent college student is found raped and murdered in her own Dallas condo. The tragic event inspires her best friend to risk her own life in pursuit of the killer and justice. It's a heart-wrenching real life who dunnit.

programme.title: Suspicion: A Sister's Suspicion
programme.desc: When married mother of two Debbie Groseclose disappears without a trace, law enforcement are left mystified as to her whereabouts. With no evidence and no witnesses, it is up to Debbie's family to follow their suspicions and catch her killer.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: One of Their Own
programme.desc: When the daughter of an FBI agent disappears from an airport parking lot, law enforcement from all over the country rallies to find one of their own. But the case quickly becomes one of the bureau's most difficult and heartbreaking investigations.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Capitol Murder
programme.desc: An elected community official is found stabbed to death in his Washington D.C. home, raising the question of whether it was his public or private life that led to his death.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: The Disappearance of Sarah Stern
programme.desc: When a young woman's car is found abandoned on a bridge, police must consider three possibilities, she's run away, committed suicide, or is the victim of murder.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Rural Madness
programme.desc: Differences over how to enjoy life in a peaceful, rural neighborhood quickly escalate into a feud that comes to a bloody end on the road where it began.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Kill-De-Sac
programme.desc: When a freewheeling family moves from California to the buttoned down enclave of Leesburg, Virginia, they quickly get on the wrong side of their neighbour across the way. The conflict escalates until bullets fly and blood flows in the street.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Night of the Machete
programme.desc: Two young couples in an Idaho apartment building walk on eggshells around a neighbor who can't stand the one couple's music and the other's dog. Tensions keep rising between all parties until finally hell breaks loose and a violent rampage erupts.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: A Killer View
programme.desc: A young family builds their dream home in the Kentucky Hills, but their heaven is hell for the quiet couple living next door. Also, a dispute over a shared road leads to fireworks, fury, and cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Goering's Greed
programme.desc: Billions of dollars of art and treasure was stolen by the second most powerful figure in Nazi Germany. The team search for items stolen from Holland, including sunken treasure and lost masterpieces.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: The Mystery of Rommel's Gold
programme.desc: In 1943, the Nazis looted $50 million in gold from the Jewish community in Djerba, Tunisia. The team tracks the loot to a dive site off Corsica, a pawn shop in Germany, and the family of an escaped Nazi in South America.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Kurt Lishka
programme.desc: The story of German housewife Beate Klarsfeld and her husband Serge, who helped track down former Paris Gestapo chief Kurt Lishka. Lishka ordered the arrest and murder of over 33,000 Jews yet lived as a free man in Germany for years.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Klaus Barbie
programme.desc: The husband and wife team of Serge and Beate Klarsfeld worked tirelessly to have Nazi war criminal Klaus Barbie extradited from Bolvia to stand trail in France. Barbie, known as 'The Butch of Lyon', was responsible for the deaths of 10,000 French Jews.

programme.title: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: The story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Hitler's Messiah Complex
programme.desc: Discover how a series of psychotic episodes in his early life convinced Adolf Hitler that he was a modern day Pharaoh.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Adolf Eichmann
programme.desc: This is the hunt for Adolf Eichmann, considered by many to be one of the main architects of the Holocaust.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Erich Priebke
programme.desc: A half-century after the war, American journalists track down former Gestapo officer Erich Priebke. Priebke, who was responsible for some of Italy's worst atrocities, fled to Argentina after the war.

programme.title: Hitler's Messiah Complex
programme.desc: Discover how a series of psychotic episodes in his early life convinced Adolf Hitler that he was a modern day Pharaoh.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Adolf Eichmann
programme.desc: This is the hunt for Adolf Eichmann, considered by many to be one of the main architects of the Holocaust.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Erich Priebke
programme.desc: A half-century after the war, American journalists track down former Gestapo officer Erich Priebke. Priebke, who was responsible for some of Italy's worst atrocities, fled to Argentina after the war.

programme.title: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: The story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Klaus Barbie
programme.desc: The husband and wife team of Serge and Beate Klarsfeld worked tirelessly to have Nazi war criminal Klaus Barbie extradited from Bolvia to stand trail in France. Barbie, known as 'The Butch of Lyon', was responsible for the deaths of 10,000 French Jews.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Kurt Lishka
programme.desc: The story of German housewife Beate Klarsfeld and her husband Serge, who helped track down former Paris Gestapo chief Kurt Lishka. Lishka ordered the arrest and murder of over 33,000 Jews yet lived as a free man in Germany for years.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Megacities
programme.desc: In this episode we'll examine how the Nazis began to stamp their image on Germany and the nations that had fallen under the German jackboot. From plans to redesign Berlin as the capital of the world, to the destruction of Warsaw.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Head Quarters
programme.desc: Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Transporting the Reich
programme.desc: At look at how Hitler's redesign of the German transport system was a key factor in his preparations for war, including how he used the car industry for the rearmament of his military and see his plans for a colossal rail system.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Making America
programme.desc: We all know of George Washington, the California Gold Rush, the vast highways that stretch across America, and the wars between the United States and Great Britain. Learn about the secrets behind the making of America.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Verge of Destruction
programme.desc: We've all heard about the fallout shelters used for refuge during World War II, the deadly firebombing of Tokyo, and the D-Day invasion on the beaches of Normandy but there are more secrets.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Bat Masterson: Defender of Dodge
programme.desc: This well-dressed gunfighter was a gambler, a hunter, an Indian fighter, and a scout; but above all else, Bat Masterson was a lawman. As Sheriff of Ford County, Kansas, Bat Masterson kept the peace on the volatile Frontier.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Jesse James: The South's Last Rebel
programme.desc: The life and exploits of outlaw Jesse James are recounted.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: River House of Dreams
programme.desc: Designer Sarah Richardson is back at the country house with some valuable advice on the design of the master en-suite. Meanwhile at the suburban house, the guys use some cool technology to improve the home's energy efficiency.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Smart Suburban Holmes
programme.desc: With the interior of the river house complete, it's time to focus on the suburban home as the open house date is fast approaching. Mike, MJ and the crew work feverishly to get the smart home ready and receive the valuation they're hoping to earn.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: A Thousand Goodbyes
programme.desc: Flooring takes center stage inside the country house, while outside the barn is finally completed. The river house gets its finishing touches as Mike and MJ prepare to say goodbye to the Thousand Islands.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Holmes Stretch
programme.desc: The first property that Mike Holmes and his son, MJ, bought is the last to be finished. Time is money, and there's still a ton of work to be done before they can put the sign up on the lawn.

programme.title: Building Alaska: I Need Five Hands
programme.desc: Paige and Cody's build takes a hit after Sterling and Joe leave the site and a trailer full of vital materials breaks down. The foundation is sinking at Mike and Teresa's cabin while Kathleen and Mike Kondus watch part of their cabin begin to crumble.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Absolutely Insane
programme.desc: The Konduses fight the rain and shattered window panes deep in the White Mountains. Mike and Teresa's team gets stuck on slippery scaffolding 19 feet in the air while Paige and Cody's build stalls thanks to a material ordering snafu near the deadline.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Rain, Rain, Go Away
programme.desc: Rain and a muddy trail continue to slow down Brannon's cabin build, but despite their dampened spirits, the gang is able to haul the windows across the two-mile trail. Jere and Ben finally get the barge launched.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cob Cottage
programme.desc: After years of apprenticing, Sonia is putting her skills to the test by building her first house: an off-grid cob cottage on top of an Oregon mountain. Her lack of experience and the Pacific Northwest's rainy season could wash away her dreams.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Absolutely Insane
programme.desc: The Konduses fight the rain and shattered window panes deep in the White Mountains. Mike and Teresa's team gets stuck on slippery scaffolding 19 feet in the air while Paige and Cody's build stalls thanks to a material ordering snafu near the deadline.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Rain, Rain, Go Away
programme.desc: Rain and a muddy trail continue to slow down Brannon's cabin build, but despite their dampened spirits, the gang is able to haul the windows across the two-mile trail. Jere and Ben finally get the barge launched.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cob Cottage
programme.desc: After years of apprenticing, Sonia is putting her skills to the test by building her first house: an off-grid cob cottage on top of an Oregon mountain. Her lack of experience and the Pacific Northwest's rainy season could wash away her dreams.

programme.title: Building Alaska: I Need Five Hands
programme.desc: Paige and Cody's build takes a hit after Sterling and Joe leave the site and a trailer full of vital materials breaks down. The foundation is sinking at Mike and Teresa's cabin while Kathleen and Mike Kondus watch part of their cabin begin to crumble.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Yard Crashers: Hamptons Hangout
programme.desc: This dark and uninviting yard has these homeowners staying indoors. Mark delivers a design that will allow them to live outdoors. He installs a multi-tiered deck with dining table, a patio with a fire pit and sofa, as well as beach seating and a bar.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Carpenters Hall
programme.desc: The crew stays local and heads just down the street in Roanoke where they salvage a one-of-a-kind sign and pick through an old meeting hall. Later, Mike and Tay build a TV console out of old material.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Former Dixie Furniture Plant
programme.desc: The team travel to a vacant furniture plant in Lexington, NC, where they work in near-darkness salvaging conveyor belts, fire doors, veneer molds, factory carts, and industrial lights.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Lerner House
programme.desc: The crew travels to Orange, VA to salvage a 1930s brick mansion, including its columns and windows. Mike and Robert return General George C. Marshall's door to the Virginia Military Institute. Tay and Mike build a coffee table from a door.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Tully Choice Cabin
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs save steps and chimney rocks from a 1765 log cabin at Smith Mountain Lake. Gracie takes the team to a local glassblowing artist to make pieces for a chandelier. Robert and Ted also pick through a barn.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging Items in Boardman, Oh, into Repurposed Goods
programme.desc: Mike builds a bed frame from horse jump poles; the crew brings in an expert.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Reed Creek Mill
programme.desc: The Dawgs salvage the Reed Creek Mill in Wytheville, VA. Key items found include conveyor belts and a flour hopper. Mike also builds a console for his nephew.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Baltimore Fireboat
programme.desc: After a call from their old friend, Captain Tim, the crew travels to Norfolk, Virginia, to salvage a fireboat from Baltimore. When they return to the shop, Mike and Tay enlist the help of a local coppersmith to fashion unique foot baths for Hotel Roanoke.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Drayton Mill
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs travel to the Drayton Mill in Spartanburg, SC. Key items salvaged include a large fan and valves. Mike builds a new desk for his office out of a salvaged airplane wing.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Fringer Cannery
programme.desc: Mike, Robert, and the crew salvage an old iron ore mine that was converted into a cannery in the 1930s. Main items include a curved I-beam, oversized pressure-cookers, and a canning carousel.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Wilberger Funeral Home
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs team saves parts of the Wilberger Funeral Home in New Hope, VA. Key items salvaged include an elevator and barn door hardware. Back in Roanoke, Mike and the guys build a collapsible bookcase.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Game On
programme.desc: The three build teams kick off their builds in remote Alaskan settings. Bruce Chambers and his crew begin a cabin on LaTouche Island. Mark Sams and his crew begin a cabin in Freshwater Bay. Dave Poppert and his family begin a compound on Point MacKenzie.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Piece of the Pie
programme.desc: At Bruce Chambers' build, running out of supplies has put the build at a standstill. Mark Sams and his crew are challenged by getting their foundation level and square. Dave Poppert and his family deal with record setting heat.

programme.title: Building Alaska: The Wrong Stuff
programme.desc: At Bruce Chambers' build site on LaTouche Island, their worst nightmare becomes a reality when their backup generator dies. On Mark Sams' build in Freshwater Bay, near Hoonah, one of his crew is missing, and Mark hopes for the best.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Stormy Weather
programme.desc: At Bruce Chambers' build on LaTouche Island, getting the log walls up continues to be a nightmare, but Bruce finds the perfect way to let off some steam. On Chichagof Island, Mark Sams and his crew endure pounding rain that makes the build miserable.

programme.title: Cake Wars: Wonder Woman
programme.desc: It's the 75th anniversary of Wonder Woman and Cake Wars is joining the party. Four bakers will face the golden Lasso of Truth from the judges.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Small Town to Farmville
programme.desc: Noah Cappe travels to the Nederland Heritage Festival, where food from around the world is prepared by an army of volunteers. From the cowboy pistolettes to sopapillas to chicken fried bacon and a very fun egg-stravaganza, see all the delicious delights.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Crawfish to California
programme.desc: Noah Cappe goes coastal at the Louisiana Crawfish Festival.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Chowchilla-Madera to Ciao!
programme.desc: In the tiny town of Chowchilla, CA Noah Cappe discovers some carnival eats that deserve to be shared with the world. First up, it's the Deep Pit Barbeque, a meat extravaganza that takes three days to prepare.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Strawberry to Silver Dollar
programme.desc: The Brandywine Strawberry Festival in Pennsylvania is home to 'The Colossalo,' a crab cake/roast beef combo that has host Noah Cappe going wild. Other favourites include The Sizzler, the chicken parm'wich and strawberry kettle corn.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Deep-Fried Inferno
programme.desc: Where there's smoke, there's fire, and Noah Cappe is ready to have his taste buds fired up at the Spencerport Volunteer Firemen's Association Carnival in New York. From the Flaming Weck to the Five Alarm Fries, there's plenty of sizzle.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Grillers in the Mist
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to New York for the Long Island Fun Fest and some Empire State eats. He can't resist a pizza covered in gooey penne alla vodka or a fancy Hamptons Dog, and he also tries the ultimate Italian-American combo, a Cannoli Calzone.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Key West
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern delights in the fun and funky flavors of Key West, Florida. From conch fritters, coconut pink shrimp and fried hogfish sandwiches to toasty Cubanos and quintessential Key lime pie, Key West is full of fresh eats and local ingredients.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Phnom Penh
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern discovers the complex flavors of Phnom Penh, Cambodia. Spicy grilled crab, cold and refreshing beef salad and herbaceous fish and noodle soup reflect a mission to preserve the uniqueness of Cambodian cuisine.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: West Virginia
programme.desc: Andrew travels to West Virginia, where people are using methods both old and new to prepare wildlife that flourishes in the state's mountains and rivers.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Boston
programme.desc: In Boston, Andrew sets out to prove that a city steeped in American history can also be a breeding ground for new, exciting food trends. Andrew finds that American ingenuity and independence are front-row center in this tour through Boston.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Crunch Time
programme.desc: From double-decibel fried beef ribs in Atlanta to a loud and proud peanut butter burger in Vegas, these joints are making delicious noise with some of the crunchiest eats across the country.

programme.title: Food Paradise: T.G.I. Fried
programme.desc: Diners enjoy fry-day every day at these hot spots across the country, from super-stacked crispy chicken sandwiches and deep-fried lobster tails to sweet potato beignets and fanciful churros.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Key West
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern delights in the fun and funky flavors of Key West, Florida. From conch fritters, coconut pink shrimp and fried hogfish sandwiches to toasty Cubanos and quintessential Key lime pie, Key West is full of fresh eats and local ingredients.

programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern discovers the complex flavors of Phnom Penh, Cambodia. Spicy grilled crab, cold and refreshing beef salad and herbaceous fish and noodle soup reflect a mission to preserve the uniqueness of Cambodian cuisine.

programme.title: Beach Bites With Katie Lee: Catalina Island
programme.desc: Catalina Island offers a microcosm of California cuisine. Katie heads to Mt. Ada for a juicy lamb burger with a view.

programme.title: Beach Bites With Katie Lee: The Bahamas
programme.desc: Katie goes to the most food-centric island in the Bahamas: New Providence. Conch is a staple here, so Katie can't turn down a fresh conch salad.

programme.title: Beach Bites With Katie Lee: The Gulf Coast of Mississippi
programme.desc: Katie Lee is on a mission to find the best beach food along the Gulf Coast of Mississippi.

programme.title: Beach Bites With Katie Lee: The Pacific Coast Highway
programme.desc: Katie Lee is hitting California's famed Pacific Coast Highway to find delicious, international beach food in a beautiful coastal setting. In Monterey, she discovers rich Italian influences in cioppino with local Dungeness crab.

programme.title: Beach Bites With Katie Lee: The South Carolina Coast
programme.desc: A number of quaint beach towns along the South Carolina coast are leading a revolution in Lowcountry cuisine, and Katie Lee finds the best beach bites in Sullivan's Island, Mt. Pleasant, Isle of Palms and Folly Beach.

programme.title: Beach Bites With Katie Lee: Tybee Island
programme.desc: Katie Lee heads to Tybee Island, Georgia, a barrier island just 18 miles southeast of culinary Mecca Savannah. The small island is full of big flavors, and Katie starts her exploration with perfectly sweet local shrimp and a spicy blackened fish hoagie.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Buon Appetito
programme.desc: Bobby fondly reminisces about his time spent in Italy as he comes up with an amazing brunch menu inspired by the flavors and food of the Italian Countryside.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Off to the Races
programme.desc: Bobby's passion for cooking is matched by his love of horse racing. He serves up a brunch menu fit for the Kentucky Derby.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Brunch on the Run
programme.desc: A busy weekend schedule doesn't prevent Chef Bobby Flay from enjoying the brunch experience, even on the go. Take anywhere dishes include cinnamon sugar French toast sticks with maple cream, and a pressed egg sandwich.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Big Apple Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay takes a little inspiration from his hometown to create a versatile and delicious 'Big Apple' brunch. His apple-themed menu features irresistible apple cider donuts, apple sauce parfaits with yogurt and crispy quinoa, and eggs benedict.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Deep-Fried Comfort Creations
programme.desc: Michael digs into an incredible one-of-a-kind creation: a deep-fried burger.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Ooey, Gooey and Cheesy
programme.desc: Michael Symon gets messy in New Orleans with a bacon-onion jam, brie and brioche burger.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Bayou Barbecue and Saucy Skillets
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Las Vegas, Nev., with a skillet full of pork belly chili and a mega-pancake that's the ultimate collision of apple pie and brunch.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Barbecue Boss of All Sandwiches
programme.desc: In Palm Springs, Calif., Michael Symon sinks his teeth into a meaty stacked sandwich and a beefy ballpark dog. In Oklahoma City, a gas station-turned-burger joint serves a fried apple and brie cheeseburger to fuel the soul.

programme.title: Good Eats: This Spud's for You
programme.desc: Host Alton Brown ponders the potato and its main ingredient: starch. The Baked Potato, Mashers and Potato/Portobello Gratin are examined.

programme.title: Good Eats: The Egg-Files
programme.desc: Crack the mysterious egg case and pursue a higher understanding of this amazing ovoid.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Planet Of The Dates
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is ready for 1,001 nights of fun at the Arabian Nights-themed Riverside County Fair and National Date Festival in Indio, Calif. He makes a date with a dangerous burger and enjoys a sweet mashup with the churro dog.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: There Will Be Bacon
programme.desc: Noah Cappe pigs out at the Bacon and Bourbon Fest in Wellington, Fla., where all-American classics make an appearance in the stuffed crust bacon-za, but it's the peanut butter pork donuts that hit the sweet and salty spot.

programme.desc: After Brittany and the girls release a video that goes viral, Alvin, Simon, and Theodore try to top it. Simon falls ill and asks Alvin and Theodore not to go see a new movie without him, but Alvin just can't resist.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Pack Animal/ The Haunted Getaway
programme.desc: Dave tells Simon to throw out some stuff, and a few of his experiments end up in the wrong hands; Dave and the guys rent a cabin in the woods that might be haunted.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Super Heroes/ She's Got Style
programme.desc: When Theodore thinks he's a real superhero, Alvin and Simon have a tough time convincing him he's not. Brittany is embarrassed by Jeanette's lack of style until Jeanette is proclaimed a fashion trendsetter by Brittany's icon.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: Believe It or Not
programme.desc: The Rangers are skeptical when Steel says he's found clues that prove Evox may have returned.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: Evox: Upgraded
programme.desc: The Rangers mount a desperate mission to stop Evox once and for all.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Something's Fishy/ Presto Chang-O
programme.desc: Timmy is at the beach and he's bored silly. Wanting to go diving, he wishes to become a fish; Timmy hasn't studied for a test in Mr. Crocker's class so he wishes for a device that allows him to change places with anyone who comes in contact with it.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Manic Mom Day/ Crocker of Gold
programme.desc: Timmy wishes the fairies would pretend to haunt Dimmsdale; Mom and Dad have a surf-off.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Don't Look Now/ Séance Schméance
programme.desc: SpongeBob holds a séance at the Krusty Krab to learn the recipe for a long-lost sandwich. Then, SpongeBob and Patrick go to see the latest horror film, only to be seemingly stalked by the villain.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Tutor Sauce/ Lost in Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to take a shortcut to work, but gets lost along the way. After failing his driver's test, Mr. Krabs decides to teach SpongeBob how to drive himself.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sanctuary! / What's Eating Patrick?
programme.desc: When stray snails start appearing around Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob decides to care for them himself. To defend Bikini Bottom's honor, Patrick enters a Krabby Patty eating competition.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Fish Bowl/ Married to Money
programme.desc: Sandy attempts to study Patrick and SpongeBob. Mr. Krab announces he's getting married.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sold!/ Lame and Fortune

programme.desc: Bob applies at the Krusty Krab; a mess ends up on Squidward's lawn; meeting Sandy for tea.

programme.desc: Bob and Squid deliver Krabby Patty pizza; Bob loses his pineapple house to parasites.

programme.desc: When Pat suddenly grows a very grown-up beard, he decides it's time to act like a grown-up, too.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Musclebob Buffpants/ Squidward, the Unfriendly Ghost
programme.desc: Squidward pretends to be a ghost to get Patrick and Spongebob to leave him in peace.

programme.desc: The gang thinks that Sandy's pet caterpillar has been consumed by a 'monster' butterfly; Bob markets his coloured crabcakes to the Krusty Krab's clientele.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Employee of the Month

programme.desc: Sandy is going into hibernation; it's alright to 'borrow' things if you return them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The List Murders
programme.desc: For 18 years, a man who murdered his entire family successfully eluded the FBI. Investigators used art and forensic science to find the killer and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Raw Terror
programme.desc: The story of Damion Heersink, an eleven-year-old boy who almost died after eating an improperly cooked hamburger teeming with E-Coli, and the people who saved his life.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Common Thread
programme.desc: The year was 1984, and a serial killer was on the loose in Florida. Eight women had been found dead. At each crime scene, investigators found tiny red fibers, fibers they hoped would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Dirty Deed
programme.desc: Eileen and Derrick Severs disappeared from their home in the small village of Hambleton in Great Britain, and police found evidence which suggested foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Bond
programme.desc: The story of nurse Tanya Reid who may have murdered her own baby and was planning to murder her son.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Out of the Ashes
programme.desc: On a cold December night in 1993, Rose Larner stopped in a convenience store on her way to her boyfriend’s house. She was never seen or heard from again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Invisible Intruder
programme.desc: A Texas woman claims that an intruder attacked her and killed two of her sons, but detectives question her story when they find some inconsistencies at the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ultimate Betrayal
programme.desc: Fire sweeps through a mansion, killing two children, all evidence leads to the mother.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Human Sawdust
programme.desc: A suitcase leads to the gruesome discovery of a nearly perfect crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Green Pen
programme.desc: When a Yale student mysteriously vanishes days before her wedding investigators comb a secure research lab for clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Transaction Failed
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone, or if she was the victim of foul play. Investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to find the answers they needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Day the Music Died
programme.desc: When grunge singer Mia Zapata was gruesomely murdered, police were at a loss to track down her killer. But thanks to evidence collected by a forethoughtful medical examiner, police were able to catch the killer more than a decade after the fact.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Evidence
programme.desc: The shooting of a man during a hunting trip is reopened years after the incident, and the victim's hunting partner becomes a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Formula
programme.desc: The mother of a suspiciously murdered four-month-old was convicted, but an explanation for the death would come five months later from the most unlikely of sources: his newborn brother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cement the Case
programme.desc: A man confesses to killing his wife, but forensic evidence may lead to another suspect.

programme.desc: Lori and Lincoln visit the city. Lori struggles to be a city girl and Lincoln finds Ronnie Anne has changed.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: Legend of Isla Nublar: The Secret Exhibit
programme.desc: Simon Masrani has tasked his newly hired assistant, Claire Dearing, to deliver a trio of dinosaurs to Jurassic World's new super-secret exhibit! Unfortunately, Owen Grady, the animal behaviorist Claire hired to deliver the dinosaurs, is late.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Chocolate With Nuts/ Superfriends

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: An Elevated Ferret Alert
programme.desc: Find out which trick made it hard for Michael to walk the next day, what trick was added at the last minute after a prop broke and what animal Michael fosters during shoots.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: A Faux Pas to Wear
programme.desc: Why Michael says "shenanigans" during some tricks, his favorite trick of all time and why the crew had to shut down production for an hour.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joker for a Day
programme.desc: Find out which challenges the crew loves the most and what the original name for the TV show started off as. Also, find out how the Jokers pick their victims.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pay It Forward
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on the very first Impractical Jokers episode and discover what social superpower the Jokers now possess. Plus, find out which audio equipment is not used anymore and the true history around Joe's 'nosing'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Butterfly Crime Scene
programme.desc: Find out what classic phrase was uttered in this early episode that is still said today, and what unaired challenges almost made it to the show. Plus, the real backstory of Butterfly Crime Scene.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Drawing a Blank
programme.desc: Find out what classic bit began in this early episode, which Jokers used to live together, and why filming in Times Square became a bad idea.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: The guys skirt the law while posing as receptionists, then go fishing at an unlikely locale. And the heat is on tonight's big losers as they try to give one unlucky customer the deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q take some customers for a wild ride, and things get messy when they ask fellow shoppers for a hand. Plus, the big losers suffer a monster punishment that leaves them crushed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: The Misery Index: He's Crushing His Man Cave Game
programme.desc: The Tenderloins witness the most embarrassing way to ruin a wedding.

programme.title: The Misery Index: If My Grandmother Was That Hot, I'd Go for Her Too
programme.desc: Murr doesn't want to 'pucker up' and Sal would rather have fire ants on his face than heave this misery. A bidet victim and someone who showed nudes to their boss compete for master of misery.

programme.title: The Misery Index: So That's Murder Then?
programme.desc: Jameela shows us there are some things you don't want to find in your toilet. Saul shows us how to ruin a wedding. A pants-wetter and a forgetful husband battle for the chance at the grand prize.

programme.title: The Misery Index: Men of Intellect
programme.desc: Joe and Q become 'gentlemen', a little piggy goes to the emergency room, and a man rides the elevator from hell as a clumsy paramedic and accidental sexter battle to be masters of misery.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: The Food Flattener
programme.desc: At a cooking class, Michael gets crabby when chopping salad and brings the heat to instantly cook a meatball with his breath. Later, Michael chills his assistant to her bones when a cryotherapy experiment freezes.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Pixelated Vision
programme.desc: Michael reels in customers with a new fishing tool and shows off a camera that's literally paper thin. Plus, a day of mini golf turns explosive.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Total Face Rejuvenation
programme.desc: Michael shocks a receptionist with a medical procedure and later reveals a regenerating piece of gum. Plus, an electrifying trick rewrites history.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: You've Been Marked
programme.desc: Michael shows off a seashell from the seashore that still has the seashore in it and reveals desserts that break the mold. Plus, at a farm, Michael startles his assistant with a trick that's 'out-of-this-world.'

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship: Llama Drama
programme.desc: Move over unicorns, there's a new animal after our hearts. The nine young bakers must create llama cupcakes in a chosen flavour. Hosts and judges Valerie Bertinelli and Duff Goldman also welcome a special guest - a real live llama!

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship: One Potato, Two Potato
programme.desc: Potatoes aren't just for French fries anymore- they're for decorating. Hosts Valerie Bertinelli and Duff Goldman ask the eight remaining bakers to carve potato cutouts and create colorful potato-print cookies.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship: Ice Cream Cone-a-copia
programme.desc: Ice cream cones are for more than just holding ice cream. Hosts Valerie Bertinelli and Duff Goldman challenge the seven kid bakers to create impressive ice cream cone cupcakes in order to stay in the game.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship: Mama Mia!
programme.desc: For this Italian-bakery themed challenge, hosts Valerie Bertinelli and Duff Goldman task the remaining six bakers with creating Italian rainbow cookies featuring classic flavours like apricot, cherry, almond, lemon, hazelnut or espresso.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship: Extra Icing: Architectural Digestible
programme.desc: Interior decorating is the inspiration as Valerie Bertinelli and Duff Goldman challenge the five kid bakers to create beautiful decorations and mouth-watering layers in showstopping trifles.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship: Dinomighty
programme.desc: Welcome to the Dinosaur Park! Valerie Bertinelli and Duff Goldman challenge the four bakers to show off their baking and building skills by making 3-D dinosaur cookies in the shape of a T. rex, velociraptor, stegosaurus, brontosaurus or triceratops.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship: The Fruit of Your Labor
programme.desc: Fruit is an important element of baking, so Valerie Bertinelli and Duff Goldman challenge the final three bakers to make fruit cakes, but not the holiday kind. Instead, they have to make cakes that look like actual fruit!

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Pancake House Favorites
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay is putting a new spin on classic neighborhood pancake house dishes, like mini Denver omelet frittatas with crispy hammy croutons and silver dollar tropical pancakes with mascarpone whipped cream.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Money-Saving Showstoppers
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay is serving a brunch that's easy on the wallet but full of flavour. His straight-from-the-pantry menu features an Italian egg bread bowl, a spinach salad with everything bagel croutons and a lemon caper dill vinaigrette.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Between the Bread
programme.desc: Bobby Flay creates three breakfast sandwiches inspired by some of his favorite things. He opens up with the 'Sabich,' an Israeli pita sandwich inspired by his favorite falafel shop, then creates an egg-in-a-hole benedict with roasted tomato garlic.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Get Your Fit On
programme.desc: Starting the day right is a spicy turkey merguez scramble, roasted chickpeas and avocado, followed by a tasty take on peanut butter and jelly cream of wheat.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Bobby Loves Biscuits
programme.desc: This bicuit bonanza includes biscuit French toast with cinnamon orange cane syrup, chilled bourbon vanilla latte, ham, tomato and cheddar sandwiches, and a doughnut with lemon cream filling and blueberry sauce.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Time To Pull The Curtain On Crepes
programme.desc: Bobby Flay loves crepes for brunch, and creates a variety of them including smoked salmon with ricotta, caper crepes with herb sauce, and ham and cheese egg crepes with mustard sauce.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Inspired By Italy
programme.desc: Bobby Flay makes an Italian-inspired brunch for his Naples-born friend, Cooking Channel's Laura Vitale. He puts his spin on everyone's favorite Italian dish with Breakfast Pizza, adds freshness with Dandelion Green Salad.

programme.title: The UnXplained: Bizarre Rituals
programme.desc: We explore the ancient practices that have been considered relics of bygone superstition, and the evidence that they impact the physical world.

programme.title: The UnXplained: Evil Places
programme.desc: Deadly forests, haunted houses, and mountains where visitors never make it back alive.

programme.title: The UnXplained: Incredible Survivors
programme.desc: How do some people live through the impossible? Whether it's plane crashes, bearing freezing temperatures, or performing superhuman feats while in danger- remarkable tales of human survival force us to reconsider what we know about our own will to live.

programme.title: The UnXplained: Strange Creatures
programme.desc: Millions of people claimed to have encountered other worldly creatures such as the Mothman, Chupacabra, and the Mongolian Death Worm.

programme.desc: We explore the mysteries of the inscrutable mind.

programme.title: Movie: Wife vs. Secretary
programme.desc: A valuable secretary jeopardizes her boss' marriage.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Reckoning Ball/ Clubbed
programme.desc: Chip Whistler returns to take revenge on the Greens, but is forced to apologize. Andromeda and Tilly follow Gloria to a club where they must 'cure' her of her amnesia.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Impopstar/ Football Camp
programme.desc: Cricket is mistaken for a pop star and decides to exploit the situation for all the perks of fame.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Heat Beaters / Bill-iever

programme.title: Gabby Duran and the Unsittables: Gabby Duran: Genius
programme.desc: A 13-year-old girl lands a job babysitting unruly extraterrestrial children.

programme.title: Jessie: Punch Dumped Love
programme.desc: Jessie grounds Emma from going to the school dance. Emma must sneak out to warn Luke his crush is dumping him. Adam Sandler, guest starring as himself, offers Luke some relationship advice at the dance.

programme.title: Jessie: Why Do Foils Fall in Love?
programme.desc: Jessie and Tony’s first anniversary is coming up, and Jessie’s gift to Tony is writing a song about how much he means to her, but she can’t find the right words to express how much he means to her.

programme.title: Raven's Home: It's Your Party and I'll Spy If I Want To
programme.desc: When Nia and Booker get pressured to throw an epic 13th birthday party with no moms or kids allowed, they're forced to tell Raven and Levi that they can't come.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Keepin' it Real
programme.desc: Raven secures influencer Lil Z to emcee her fashion line launch show, but the kids compromise everything when Lil Z finds out they used him to sell tickets.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Up, Up, and Away
programme.desc: When Emma, Zuri, and Ravi get new jobs, they learn their mom plans to sell the camp. Concerned that Lou will be devastated, they decide to tell her on a hot air balloon ride.

programme.title: Disney Fam Jam: Gregorio and Dixon
programme.desc: Families across America compete in epic dance battles!

programme.title: Gabby Duran and the Unsittables: The Note
programme.desc: Gabby receives an anonymous note declaring, "I know about the aliens." Before Gabby and Wesley can figure out who sent the note, they get a follow-up message with an ultimatum!

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: Nuthin' But a Dance Thang
programme.desc: Syd thinks she's too old for the father-daughter dance, but she's afraid to hurt Dad's feelings. Young Max is bummed when his Dad isn't around for a father-son event.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Sleevemore Part One: Frozen
programme.desc: When Booker freezes mid-vision, Raven takes him to Dr. Sleevemore, the same doctor who helped her when she was a teen.

programme.title: Just Roll With It: Gator's Reunion
programme.desc: With his high school reunion fast approaching, Gator worries about impressing his former classmates, so he enlists the help of the Bennett-Blatts to pose as his family.

programme.title: Coop & Cami Ask the World: Would You Wrather Get Lost?

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: You've Got Female
programme.desc: Sydney organizes a school protest about being more inclusive of women. Young Max befriends a skater girl, but is conflicted because the Dog Boys don't allow girls in their crew.

programme.title: Bunk'd: We Can't Bear It!

programme.desc: Gabby Duran lands an out-of-this-world job in her new town thanks to her Principal: babysitting an unruly group of important extraterrestrial children who are hiding out on Earth.

programme.title: Disney Fam Jam: Gregorio and Dixon
programme.desc: Families across America compete in epic dance battles!

programme.title: Jessie: Creepy Connie Comes a Callin'

programme.title: Jessie: Take the A-Train ... I Think?

programme.title: Raven's Home: Big Trouble in Little Apartment
programme.desc: Unbeknownst to Raven, Nia is starting to feel like their apartment isn't big enough for everyone and turns to her dad Devon for help.

programme.title: Raven's Home: The Bearer of Dad News
programme.desc: When Raven has a vision of Booker and Nia being upset over their Dad's move, she goes overboard trying to do all of the fun activities Devon normally did with the kids.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: How Sydney Got Her Phone Back
programme.desc: When a cell phone ban policy during school hours goes up for a vote, Sydney is sure her dad, who's on the Parent School Committee, will vote against it.

programme.title: Coop & Cami Ask the World: Would You Wrather Have a Frozen Phone?
programme.desc: Cooper is nervous about his upcoming Junior Firefighters test, but everyone assures him that he’ll pass because his dad was a firefighter.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Grandma-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Grandma Janice shows up to present Liv with an award, but something just doesn't feel right. Meanwhile, Joey invites three girls over to watch the 'Lover's Comet.'

programme.title: Raven's Home: Cop to It
programme.desc: Raven worries Tess is in trouble after the new building manager looks for the culprit behind the side of the building being tagged.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Weirder Things
programme.desc: The kids win a contest to go to a private screening of their favorite TV show.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Skunked/ Axin' Saxon

programme.desc: Buddy is Mickey's number one fan, and he can't wait to get to work for Mini=Mechanics day. Then, The Happy Helpers need to transform the Snoozy-Doozy into a pet hotel when they get so many pet-sitting requests.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Fearful Flier/ Lend Me Your Paw

programme.title: NCIS: Stop the Bleeding

programme.title: NCIS: Personal Day
programme.desc: Gibbs calls on the team to assist DEA Agent Luis Mitchell with a case that keeps going cold. Also, the team gossips about Gibbs' new look after he replaces his standard military haircut and polo shirt for a modern cut and tailored dress shirt.

programme.title: NCIS: Incognito
programme.desc: Bishop and McGee go undercover as a married couple to investigate the murder of a marine who was killed hours before meeting Gibbs about a possible case.

programme.title: NCIS: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Vance partners with Gibbs and returns to field duty when a murder case is connected to a former NCIS agent he locked up for stealing evidence.

programme.title: NCIS: Lockdown
programme.desc: While visiting a pharmaceutical lab on a murder case, Abby is trapped with no communication to the outside world after armed men take over the building and hold everyone hostage.

programme.title: NCIS: Viral
programme.desc: When a petty officer's murder matches the M.O. of a local serial killer, the NCIS team must determine if this is the killer's latest victim or the work of a copycat. Also, McGee and Delilah must learn to compromise before moving in together.

programme.title: NCIS: 16 Years
programme.desc: The NCIS murder case of a retired Navy Lieutenant Commander forces Ducky to reveal his participation in a secret society that solves cold cases.

programme.title: NCIS: Saviors
programme.desc: DiNozzo is reunited with his ex-girlfriend, Jeanne Benoit, when insurgents in Sudan attack a group of volunteer doctors, including her husband. DiNozzo and McGee travel to the crime scene for the joint murder and kidnapping case.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Assassin
programme.desc: When the leader of a war-torn nation's Democracy Movement is exiled to the United States, assassins immediately target her. Logan and Wheeler race to identify and capture the hitmen before they succeed in silencing the woman.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Please Note, We Are No Longer Accepting Letters of Recommendation From Kissinger
programme.desc: Three people are shot and killed at close range, but their two-year-olds were left unharmed. It turns out they knew their killer, who was obsessed with entry into an exclusive pre-school.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Reunion
programme.desc: When the host of a music talk show is bludgeoned to death with a champagne bottle, Logan and Wheeler's investigation into the seamy music world involves Jordie Black, Wheeler's favourite rock star from high school.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: We Don't Work Together Anymore

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Disco Bob

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Little Devil Complex
programme.desc: Antonio and his sister Gabriela go to the office of Elliot Gish, the man they believe started the fire that killed Shay. Intelligence puts pressure on Gish to confess. Lindsay approaches Voight about returning to Intelligence.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Erin's Mom
programme.desc: Bunny comes to Lindsay concerned about a suspicious repeat customer at her husband's rental company. This lead brings info into a case which robbery-homicide has been working for months. Voight doesn't trust Bunny's motive for the tip.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: What Do You Do?
programme.desc: Burgess and Roman tackle a dangerous smuggling operation with no means to defend themselves or call for help. Meanwhile, it's a slow day in intelligence and they are spending the day receiving taser certification.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: What Puts You on That Ledge
programme.desc: Commander Fischer updates Voight on a missing officer that Narcotics had deep undercover with a robbery crew. Burgess and Roman deal with a squatter.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Say Her Real Name
programme.desc: With a World Trade conference in Chicago, all members of intelligence are undercover in various protest groups to determine potential threats.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Get Back to Even
programme.desc: Intelligence responds to a drug robbery gone wrong and in their investigation it is revealed that the first person Voight ever gave his card to is linked to a double murder. Halstead discovers the real reason his brother came to Chicago.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Three G's
programme.desc: The search is on for one of Chicago's most wanted after several dead teenage girls turn up in a Chinatown factory.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Number of Rats
programme.desc: Benson travels to Chicago to help Voight and intelligence with a rape/ murder case that is eerily similar to a case from New York a decade ago. She calls in Fin and Amaro to assist.

programme.title: Movie: The Simpsons Movie
programme.desc: Homer's actions cause a leak of radioactive material from the Nuclear Plant into the river. Homer has to try and fix the problem before Springfield can no longer be saved.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Marge on the Lam

programme.title: The Simpsons: Itchy & Scratchy Land

programme.title: The Simpsons: Grampa vs. Sexual Inadequacy

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Wizard of Evergreen Terrace
programme.desc: Homer finally invents something that works and he makes sure that nothing similar exists.
