programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Hounded by Fear
programme.desc: Cesar helps dog-fearing humans overcome their phobias and overcome their anxiety when they're around dogs.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Home-Wrecking Hounds
programme.desc: Cesar visits newlyweds whose two dogs are wreaking havoc on their love nest.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: High Anxiety
programme.desc: Cesar takes on three dogs whose obsessions have led to a disquieting life for both the canines and their owners.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Pack Leaders in Training
programme.desc: Cesar has always believed that kids are more receptive to his training methods and often succeed in getting a dog to behave faster than most adults can.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Hounds From Hell
programme.desc: Pet adoption is a cause close to Cesar's heart, so he lends his support to rescue dog owners being terrorized by hounds from hell.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Pup-Pup-Hooray!
programme.desc: From constipated canines to nasty dogfights, these pups have seen better days.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: E-I-E-I-Pol
programme.desc: Spring showers bring May flowers and a rather painful situation for one unlucky patient.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Flip 'N Stitch
programme.desc: The first days of autumn bring a new vet to Pol Veterinary Services.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: The Alpacalypse
programme.desc: Dr. Pol hits the road to House Farms to handle an emergency calving, where a bone has cracked and fallen into the pelvis of the cow, blocking the calf’s way out.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Mystery of the Alien Asteroid
programme.desc: When a strange alien object is discovered speeding through the solar system, experts race to uncover if it's real evidence of extraterrestrial contact, or a deadly asteroid on a collision course with planet earth.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Journey to Alien Earths
programme.desc: New discoveries of alien earths reveal vital clues in finding extraterrestrial life, using the latest science and technology, experts reveal the strange landscapes and oceans of these distant worlds.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Finding Alien Moons
programme.desc: New discoveries are helping experts in their search for the first alien moon outside our solar system, which could be Earth-like worlds with the potential for life. So far, they haven't found any, but twenty-first century methods might change everything.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: The Time Travel Enigma
programme.desc: Recent discoveries in the cosmos are proving that time travel is less impossible than we think, while the newest discoveries in space and theoretical physics have us on the brink of cracking one of the universe's greatest puzzles.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Earth's Secret Enemies
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the hidden cosmic threats facing our planet, and with the help of the latest science and cutting-edge technology, astronomers investigate what might happen when the universe strikes back.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Battle of the Dark Universe
programme.desc: Dark matter and dark energy compete for control of the cosmos; the winner will determine the fate of the universe. New discoveries might reveal which force will emerge victorious.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Earth's Death Orbit
programme.desc: Earth's journey through the universe is a perilous one. New discoveries reveal that our planet is heading toward a mysterious area of the cosmos that could eject us out of the Milky Way and into oblivion.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Extinction
programme.desc: Asteroids strike, planets collide, black holes blast out death rays, volcanoes erupt and ice engulfs the planet. These are the universe's weapons of extinction. They've happened before - wiping out entire species, and they will happen again.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Battle of the Dark Universe
programme.desc: Dark matter and dark energy compete for control of the cosmos; the winner will determine the fate of the universe. New discoveries might reveal which force will emerge victorious.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Birth of the Earth
programme.desc: The Earth was formed by a series of cosmic cataclysms including the most powerful blast in the Universe. Look at whether the same chain of events could have created other earths inhabited by creatures like us.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: How the Universe Built Your Car
programme.desc: Beneath the hood of your car lies the history of the Universe. The iron in your chassis, the gold in your stereo and the copper in your electronics all owe their existence to violent cosmic events that took place billions of years ago.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Megastorms
programme.desc: In our quest to discover if we are alone in the universe, we shouldn't just look for worlds, we should look for weather. Find chaotic weather and maybe we will find alien life.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Black Holes: The Secret Origin
programme.desc: Recent discoveries could explain how supermassive black holes grow so big, one of the universe's most mysterious questions. Neither dark matter nor cannibalism can fully explain these monsters, but the latest science might finally provide an answer.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Big Bang
programme.desc: As experiments go, the Large Hadron Collider at Cern is one of the biggest. Its circular tunnel is 17 miles long, and the most expensive at a cost of six billion dollars. Presenter Brian Cox tackles the question: what exactly is it going to tell us?

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secret History of the Moon
programme.desc: A look at the secrets hidden in our moon.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secret History of Mercury
programme.desc: Mercury is a deadly world, facing attacks from the Sun, comets, and other planets, and even though it's the smallest planet in our solar system, it has a dangerous secret a dangerous secret that might one day threaten life on Earth.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Finding Nefertiti
programme.desc: Scientists have spent years looking for the mummy of Nefertiti, one of ancient Egypt's most iconic pharaohs. The latest tech helps experts in their search, what they discover might reveal the shocking truth about how she died, and Egypt’s dark secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Screaming Mummy
programme.desc: The Screaming Mummy is one of Egypt's greatest mysteries: a mummy with a terrifying expression frozen in agony. New discoveries reveal the connection between this horrific discovery and a pharaoh's murder, offering more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Mystery of the Cannibal Crypt
programme.desc: Mysterious tomb carvings provide dark evidence that ancient Egyptians practiced cannibalism, but we don't know why. New discoveries might finally answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to reveal more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Ramses' Forbidden City
programme.desc: Explorers in search of a lost city built by Ramses II uncover startling evidence that reveals the extent of ancient Egypt's scientific knowledge, and the new discoveries at this strange site offer more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Crocodile Queen
programme.desc: The Crocodile Queen was Egypt's first female pharaoh, but we don't who she was, or why she took this sinister alter-ego. New discoveries might finally answer this ancient mystery, and more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Tomb Raiders
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the secrets of Egypt's tomb raiders, and what ancient Egyptians did to ensure the treasures of their dead pharaohs wouldn't be stolen. The latest science answers these great mysteries, shedding new light on Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: A car used to rob a large cache of assault rifles is found parked outside a house in a Dallas suburb; a sniper must call out a possibly armed and dangerous suspect from his home; but when a young boy comes out, all strategies must be changed.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: Steve Claggett and Rich Emberlin are called out to help execute an arrest warrant on a gang of suspected crack-cocaine dealers barricaded inside a house; the SWAT team's tactical skills are put to the test as they overcome the barriers-to-entry.

programme.title: The Big House: Auburn
programme.desc: The State Penitentiary in Auburn, New York is a monument to criminal rehabilitation.

programme.title: The Big House: LA County Jail
programme.desc: Explore the LA County Jail, with 20,000 inmates and a roster that reads like a Who's Who.

programme.title: The Big House: Central Prison
programme.desc: Central Prison in Raleigh, is the first stop for all of North Carolina's male felons with sentences of 20 years or longer. Today, Central is a modern state-of-the-art prison, but it began as a dark dungeon built nearly 120 years ago.

programme.title: The Big House: Attica Prison
programme.desc: This prison was hailed as a model for the confinement of the most dangerous criminals.

programme.desc: Filmmakers explore one of America's harshest security facilities and its rich past.

programme.desc: From gunshot victims to seizures to a moped rider playing Pokémon Go, EMT's see everything on one more busy night before they can celebrate the end of the summer.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Gambling with Death
programme.desc: Ernest and Charlene Scherer are found beaten and stabbed to death in their exclusive Northern California community. It appears to be a robbery gone wrong, until investigators hone in on the motive.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: She Loves Me Not
programme.desc: When Special Forces Major David Shannon is fatally shot in his family home, investigators wonder if his job made him a target. But a deeper inspection of his personal life reveals sordid secrets... possibly leading to his murder.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Serial Deception
programme.desc: When dozens of women vanish from the sunshine state in the late 60s, they're presumed runways. It isn't until police discover the bodies of two missing teens that they uncover the sadistic work of a prolific serial killer.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: A Darker Shade of Blue
programme.desc: Chaos ensues in Fox Lake, Illinois when an officer is found dead. With a potential cop killer on the loose, the town is on lockdown. But when sordid details of the dead officer's secret life come out, the case takes a surprising turn.

programme.title: American Monster: Momma's Girl
programme.desc: Great-Grandfather Arthur Burney knows he's lucky to have such a large loving family. But when a dead body is discovered everyone becomes a suspect - and it'll take an unexpected tip-off to reveal the mastermind behind the murder.

programme.title: Twisted Love: Crippling Desire
programme.desc: A home health care nurse falls in love with her married, wheelchair-bound patient. Once the secret gets out, someone has to die.

programme.title: Stranger Among Us: Blood Red Reunion
programme.desc: After a long-lost daughter reunites with her family, their peaceful Florida neighborhood is devastated by scandal, betrayal, and a double-murder.

programme.title: Betrayed: Death by Desire
programme.desc: 34-year-old Paige Birgfeld is the ultimate multi-tasker - balancing four jobs, three kids, and two ex-husbands. No one realizes that beneath all this activity, Paige is also hiding a deep, dark secret that will eventually lead to an evil betrayal.

programme.desc: Josh is living his dream of running his family's farm with his girlfriend Donna by his side. But this perfect fantasy is shattered when Josh's mother takes the farm away from them. Revenge is served with a shotgun blast. But who pulled the trigger?

programme.title: Love Kills: Us Against the World
programme.desc: Fate in the form of a framed picture brings Lori and Mike together. Mike's been in prison and wants to start over. When he meets Lori, he wants to take care of her. But when he can't get a job, he goes to the dark side again, taking Lori with him.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Friends to Foes

programme.title: Deadly Women: Broken Ties
programme.desc: These Deadly Women brutally turned on family and in-laws.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Keep It In the Family
programme.desc: When these Deadly Women strike they keep it 'In The Family'.

programme.title: Deadly Women: In the Family
programme.desc: Some killers don't go far to find their victims. Driven by revenge, greed and family 'honor,' these women turned on their own. When these Deadly Women struck, they kept it 'In the Family.'

programme.title: Deadly Women: Lethal Vengeance
programme.desc: Revenge is one of the oldest motives for murder. But these cases are much more than an 'eye for an eye'. For some women, the insatiable quest for retribution grows wildly out of proportion to the point where they methodically seek Lethal Vengence.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Two to Tangle
programme.desc: These deadly women liked company when they killed.

programme.title: True Nightmares: Home Sweet Hell
programme.desc: A simple dispute between neighbors escalates into a serious conflict that requires police intervention; A man's uneventful life is turned upside down when his wife goes missing; A tennis star appears to be an unbeatable foe to all of her competitors.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Case that Haunts Me
programme.desc: A woman is found in the mountains, naked and covered in blood. As Det. Joe Kenda digs into who she is and what happened to her, he uncovers a world of violence and sexual fetishes, culminating in perhaps the most intense interrogation of his career.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Bring My Baby Home
programme.desc: A four-week-old girl is kidnapped, leaving her mother in anguish and police scrambling to find her. As days go by with no sign of the baby or demands for ransom, sergeants Joe Kenda and Robert Sapp fear she's been sold on the black market or worse.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Gut Instinct
programme.desc: When a soon-to-be grandmother doesn't come home from work, her daughter knows something terrible must have happened and reports her missing. As the investigation unfolds, Lt. Joe Kenda realizes they could be dealing with a fledgling serial killer.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Dallas Stoudemire: The Hero of El Paso
programme.desc: Lawlessness runs rampant in a notorious Texas outpost and it's up to legendary lawman Dallas Stoudenmire to tame the town known as 'Hell' Paso.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Petrosino vs. the Mafia
programme.desc: Turn-of-the-century Little Italy is a dangerous place, but as New York City's first Italian-American detective, Joe Petrosino is determined to do whatever it takes to protect his people.

programme.title: Tojo: Japan's Razor of Fear
programme.desc: Japanese General Hideki Tojo is a cold-blooded control freak, who takes millions to their deaths in the dirtiest war ever known. This is the story of the dictator responsible for Pearl Harbor, an Asian Holocaust and the torture of thousands of POWs.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Final Victory
programme.desc: The provoking thoughts behind some of the war's most tragic events are shared as the war in the Pacific nears its violent end.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Melvin Purvis: The Gangbuster
programme.desc: During the Great Depression, a violent crime wave is sweeping the nation. It was up to the FBI's Melvin Purvis to lead a massive manhunt for the most dangerous men in America.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Wild Bill: Marksman and Marked Man
programme.desc: When the most famous man in the Old West outlives his legend, he becomes the target of gunslingers eager to make legends of their own by shooting him dead.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Kill Zone
programme.desc: Travel to California to witness the birth of a revolution in air warfare pushing science and technology to the limits, an unmanned bomber that can take-off and land on aircraft carriers.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Hard Target
programme.desc: FutureWeapons tests inflatable armour, the revolutionary shoulder fired grenades that double the range of weapons, the latest generation of the A10 Thunderbolt ground attack planes and the assault rifle round that stays supersonic out to 1200 yards.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The SAW
programme.desc: The light machine gun launched mobile warfare by blending massive firepower with the portability of a rifle. See the evolution of this revolutionary weapon from its use in World War I to its modern incarnation: the SAW or Squad Automatic Weapon.

programme.title: Weaponology: Rapid Fire
programme.desc: One man, one weapon, lots of bullets. From the cumbersome but deadly Gatling gun to the lightweight, hand-held assassins of the modern battlefield, trace the men and the moments that developed the most deadly family of infantry weapons.

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber
programme.desc: In eight decades man went from the invention of powered flight to the B2 Stealth bomber.

programme.title: Weaponology: Body Armor
programme.desc: Follow the history of armour protection from medieval knights to the latest revolutionary invention called dragon skin. Find out how a priest invented the first bulletproof vest, and how a pizza boy came up with concealable body armour.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The Abrams Tank
programme.desc: The M1 Abrams tank is the world's most potent armored vehicle. Track its development through such forerunners as the WWII-era M18 Hellcat and the Cold War-era Soviet T-55 tank and see why these 'beast-boxes' have ruled ground warfare for decades.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Operation White Terror

programme.title: Building Alaska: Seasonal Squeeze
programme.desc: The three teams continue their builds in unique, remote Alaskan settings. At Bruce Chambers' build on LaTouche Island, the team wrestles giant glulam beams into place and the situation turns disastrous after a poorly cut beam pushes out an entire wall.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Emergency Supply Run
programme.desc: At Bruce Chambers' build on LaTouche Island, the team comes dangerously close to catastrophe as they install a 1,000 pound ridge beam. At Mark Sam's build, the team runs out of critical supplies.

programme.title: Building Alaska: A Roof Overhead
programme.desc: At Bruce Chambers' build on LaTouche Island, rain has put everything on hold and the crew struggles to keep things dry. At Mark Sam's build on Chichagof Island, tensions run high on Rich's last day making the team uneasy.

programme.title: Building Alaska: End Game
programme.desc: At Point MacKenzie, Dave Poppert fights the cold and snow to finish his home in time for Thanksgiving dinner. Bruce Chambers lucks out when a friend comes to help put the finishing touches his Latouche Island cabin.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Legacy Preserved
programme.desc: The crew pay tribute to an entomologist and late matriarch of an amazing legacy in West Gardiner, Maine, by restoring two rustic cabins on her 113-acre Wakefield Wildlife Sanctuary.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Ballard
programme.desc: An early 1900s cabin that's intimately tied to Maine's history and legacy puts Chase and the team to the test as they try to re-create its original look and feel.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family's Empty Nest
programme.desc: A family has the resources to give their Lincolnville, Maine, cabin the love it deserves now that their four children are almost done with college. However the cabin has been neglected for 25 years and corners were cut in the original build.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Veterans' Retreat
programme.desc: A man is building a retreat to help combat-injured veterans and their families adjust to their new normal. The team are tasked with turning a cottage into an ADA-compliant event center. The key feature will be a deck that can accommodate up to 40.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Ballard
programme.desc: An early 1900s cabin that's intimately tied to Maine's history and legacy puts Chase and the team to the test as they try to re-create its original look and feel.

programme.desc: A family has the resources to give their Lincolnville, Maine, cabin the love it deserves now that their four children are almost done with college. However the cabin has been neglected for 25 years and corners were cut in the original build.

programme.desc: The crew pay tribute to an entomologist and late matriarch of an amazing legacy in West Gardiner, Maine, by restoring two rustic cabins on her 113-acre Wakefield Wildlife Sanctuary.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Yard Crashers: Rock Pond Living Space
programme.desc: A dirt pile of a backyard with an old shed and dying plants is transformed into an entertainer's dream. An unused space quickly becomes everyone's hangout when a cascading rock pond takes center stage.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Mega Decks: An Ideal Family Deck With a Wood-Burning Fireplace
programme.desc: Randy and Kim want a place for their kids to hang out with their friends, as well as a place to connect and bond as a family, so they've decided to turn their old patio into a family party deck.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Ultimate Party Deck
programme.desc: A couple in Colorado dislike their home's small, exposed deck that leaves guests crowded. Garth designs a deck that opens up the walls, triples the original deck footprint, and adds a fireplace and TV to create the ultimate party space.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Blockbuster BBQ Deck Overlooking a Golf Course
programme.desc: Ed and Becky live next to a golf course. Their old deck is weathered and crumbling, and can only be used a few months a year. They challenge the Mega Crew to build a $200,000 deck that will serve as the ultimate spot to barbecue and relax.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Mountain Majesty Retreat
programme.desc: A Texas family transforms the existing deck of their vacation home into a luxurious mega deck. It features a gable roof with a skylight outside. Inside, a rustic great room gets natural log siding and a floor to ceiling fireplace with custom masonry.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Double Decker Deck With Out-of-the-Box Elements
programme.desc: With a half a million-dollar budget, this deck spares no expense. With features like an elevator, mahogany decking, three skylights, and glass walls and floors.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Three Decks, Three Pergolas, a Swim Spa, and a Water Feature
programme.desc: Brad and Ronnie have gorgeous mountain views and five acres of land, but their patio and decks are faded and cracked. They have four separate outdoor spaces and the Mega Crew is challenged to update all of them.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Log Cabin Lookout With a Wrap-Around Porch
programme.desc: Garth is challenged to create a modern, spacious deck while maintaining a log cabin feel. His plan includes redoing their entire wrap-around porch, adding a fire pit, and expanding the main area to become a fully enclosed glass living space.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Side-by-side Penthouse Decks
programme.desc: The crew is faced with the most difficult task to date, delivering side-by-side penthouse decks to neighboring couples in a historic Denver, Colorado, high-rise. The finished product includes indoor/ outdoor rooms, grills, and hot tubs.

programme.title: Mega Decks: An Entertainment Mecca With Glass Walls
programme.desc: The team transforms a useless, small, and shabby two-level deck into a double decker party zone with all the familiarities of home. Included are 18-foot high ceilings, 11-foot tall glass panels, and more audio and visual elements they've ever added.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Treehouse Deck for a Dream Retirement
programme.desc: After years of constant relocation, retired military officers Joe and Maddie have decided to turn their Colorado home into a dream retirement.

programme.title: Restored: 1928 Spanish Colonial Revival
programme.desc: Brett restores a classic Spanish Colonial Revival that hasn't been touched in years because the owner is a professional musician who is always on the road. He must make the kitchen and bath functional while staying true to the home's character.

programme.title: Restored: 1926 French Normandy Cottage
programme.desc: A cottage build in 1926 was a severely neglected rental for 30 years. Brett deals with a leaky roof, rotten windows, missing floorboards and damaged walls.

programme.title: Restored: 1920s Spanish Eclectic
programme.desc: A couple find a cute 1920s Spanish eclectic home in which they want to update the kitchen, add an ensuite bathroom and dressing room to the master, and plant a drought-tolerant garden, all staying in Spanish style.

programme.title: Restored: 1947 Postmodern Ranch
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1947 postmodern ranch back to its post-World War II style for a military veteran and his wife. However, he has to make some tough decisions when the homeowners want to get rid of the original kitchen tile.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Mocktail
programme.desc: Noah Cappe goes loco for Sunshine State snacks at the Manatee County Fair in Palmetto, Fla. There's lots of ooey-gooey goodness in the pizza supremo burger and the ulti-melt burger, but it's the sandia loca that has Noah flipping out.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Beauty and the Beef
programme.desc: It's love at first bite as Noah Cappe munches on some Texas-sized treats at Rodeo Austin. With a tagline of "where Western meets weird," the Rodeo is the place to find one-of-a-kind carnival eats like the Kobe beef Rodeo Austin burger.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Fight Club Sandwich
programme.desc: Noah Cappe meets his match with some knock-out fruity feasts at the Florida Strawberry Festival in Plant City. He starts the day with the strawberry French toast burger and slurps the way better strawberry shake.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hot Dog Time Machine
programme.desc: Noah Cappe takes a trip to the Coastal Carolina Fair near Charleston, S.C., where he samples a local legend, Jack's Cosmic Dog. Trolling the fairgrounds, Noah catches the catfish sundae and takes a bite of fall flavors with the pumpkin cheesecake pop.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Barbara, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty trek takes him to Santa Barbara, California, where he first feasts on a 2-pound portion of steamed local crab. Then he meets up with a tri-tip steak sandwich served with homemade barbecue sauce and apple horseradish.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Jose, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb's epicurean expedition takes him to San Jose, CA. His first stop is a one-of-a-kind drive-in for a crispy and golden falafel sandwich.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Billings, MT
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Billings, Montana, to tackle a one-hour steak challenge featuring a 78-ounce rib eye and two pounds of mashed potatoes, salad and bread.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Boston, MA
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to historic Boston, Massachusetts, for some epic New England eats and a 4.5-pound Irish breakfast challenge at Flann O'Brien's Pub.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Special Occasion
programme.desc: Nothing makes a special occasion more memorable than having the best food! We're counting down the best meals for any special occasion, starting with Beau MacMillan's unforgettable gnocchi in San Diego.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Genuine Legends
programme.desc: We're celebrating eats and eateries that have withstood the test of time. From America's best pancakes to the ultimate doughnuts, find out which dishes make the cut and go down in history as true legends.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Low and Slow
programme.desc: Patience is a virtue, and the greatest mouthwatering dishes can't be rushed. Wolfgang Puck admires APL Restaurant in Los Angeles for making a sandwich that's well worth the wait.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Buttered Up
programme.desc: Chefs and food experts are revealing the richest, creamiest buttery dishes out there. Alex Guarnaschelli brings on the butter with a one-of-a-kind shrimp-and-grits combo from Tillie's in Short Hills, New Jersey.

programme.title: Good Eats: Date Tripper
programme.desc: Alton tells everything you need to know to get dates into your culinary life, including three recipes for the 1960s classic 'Devils on Horseback' and a very 'scrummy' sticky toffee pudding.

programme.title: Good Eats: The Ballad of Salty and Sweet
programme.desc: Host Alton Brown examines ways to super-charge desserts with salt.

programme.title: Good Eats: The Proof Is in the Bread Pudding
programme.desc: Alton Brown uses a secret formula in an attempt to devise definitive bread pudding.

programme.title: Good Eats: A Bird in the Pie Is Worth Two in the Bush
programme.desc: Alton Brown looks at ways to resurrect classic foods like chicken potpie.

programme.desc: A woman lends her BFF money to keep a failing juice bar buoyant and would like to be reimbursed now that the sales are up. Then, a woman helps a friend's niece down on her luck and ended up with thousands of dollars in unpaid rent and damages.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Explosive DNA Drama
programme.desc: Cecilia has been searching for her biological father her entire life. After 27 years, she believes a man named Jesse is the one. However, his family isn't so quick to embrace her as part of their family.

programme.title: Maury: My Sister Slept With a Lot of Men ... That's Not Your Kid!
programme.desc: Tasha says Dujuan is the father of her daughter, but her sister, Lazenda, says otherwise. Ashley reconnected with a high school crush for a night of passion; now he's denying her son. Cassandra and Carl are back to see if Carl fathered Cassandra's baby.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Relationships in the Gutter
programme.desc: Nicki wants to put her wedding to Alex on hold so she can confess about cheating on him with her ex-boyfriend. Plus, Shonda exacts revenge on her friend by hooking up with her boyfriend.

programme.title: Movie: Little Boy
programme.desc: When his beloved father goes overseas to fight in WWII, a seven-year-old boy is willing to do whatever it takes to bring him back safe and sound.

programme.title: Movie: Benny and Joon
programme.desc: A misfit who shelters his mentally ill sister stumbles onto the perfect companion for her.

programme.title: Movie: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: After being picked as her best friend's maid of honour, a broke woman tries to bluff her way through the expensive bridesmaid rituals.

programme.title: Movie: Arizona
programme.desc: A single and struggling realtor mom's life goes off the rails when she witnesses a murder.

programme.title: Movie: Love Actually
programme.desc: Ten different British couples sort out their love lives during the Christmas holidays.

programme.title: Movie: Punch Drunk Love
programme.desc: A beleaguered small-business owner embarks on a romantic journey with a mysterious woman.

programme.title: Movie: She's Funny That Way
programme.desc: A married Broadway director solicits a young prostitute who dreams of becoming an actress. Not only does she land a role in his latest play, but she'll be acting alongside his wife, the star of the show.

programme.title: Movie: Stakeout
programme.desc: A police officer falls in love with the woman he is supposed to be investigating.

programme.title: Movie: Happy Death Day 2U
programme.desc: Two years after she was forced to relive the day of her murder over and over again, a young woman finds herself caught in another deadly time loop, only this time her friends are caught in it too, forcing her to unmask the killer to break the cycle.

programme.title: Movie: Arthur
programme.desc: A loveable millionaire risks it all when he falls in love with an irascible waitress.

programme.title: Movie: Keeping Up With the Steins
programme.desc: As a young boy's bar mitzvah approaches, he invites his estranged grandfather to stay with the family. As a result, the boy learns what it means to be a man.

programme.title: Movie: Thank You for Smoking
programme.desc: A spokesman for the tobacco companies tries to be a role model for his 12-year-old son while putting a positive spin on cigarettes.

programme.title: Movie: Intolerable Cruelty
programme.desc: A divorce lawyer meets his match when he falls for the gold-digger he defeated in court.

programme.title: Movie: Long Shot
programme.desc: A free-spirited journalist bumps into his childhood crush, who happens to be running for the Presidency. She impulsively hires him as her speechwriter, and sparks begin to fly between the two childhood friends despite their very different lives.

programme.title: Movie: It's Kind of a Funny Story
programme.desc: After checking himself into an adult psychiatric ward, a clinically depressed teenager gets a fresh start.
